name: Anilarir Ras
benefits: By regular consumption of this formulation, Aamvata Rog (Rheumatoid Arthritis) is completely destroyed.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Eranda Taila (एरण्डतैल)	Castor Oil	1 part
Shu. Guggulu (शु. गुग्गुलु)	Purified Guggul resin (Commiphora mukul)	1 part
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Ginger + Black Pepper + Long Pepper powder	1 part
Shu. Gandhak Churna (शु. गन्धकचूर्ण)	Purified Sulphur powder	1 part
preparation:
2. Add Trikatu Churna and Shuddha Gandhak Churna and mix well.
3. Transfer to a perform Mardana procedure and add Eranda Taila (castor oil).
5. Form tablets (Vati) of 375 mg each and dry in shade. Store in a glass container.
6. This preparation is known as Anilarir Ras.

shloka: आमानिलस्यास्य रसोऽनिलारिश्चैरण्डतैलेन सकौशिकेन । कटुत्रयेणापि सगन्धकेन वल्लैकमानं परिषेवयेत ।।५२।।

name: Prabhavati Vati
benefits: Cures: Vatavyadhi (all Vata disorders), Udara Vikara (abdominal diseases), and Apasmara (epilepsy/convulsions).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated gold	10 gm
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated mica	10 gm
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	10 gm
Tiksna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	Teekshna Loha Bhasma	10 gm
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)		10 gm
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated copper	10 gm
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	20 gm

Bhavana Dravya (Processing Substances)
Sariva Kwath
Snuhi Kshira
Chitraka Mula Kwath
Shigru Tvak Kwath
Patha Kwath
Surana Kanda Ras
Nirgundi Patra Svaras
Bhanga Svaras
Eranda Mula Tvak Kwath
Malkangni Taila
Gandhaka Taila
Sarshapa Taila
preparation:
1. Triturate Parada and Haritala together in a mortar to make proper Kajjali.
2. Add remaining Suvarnadi Bhasmas and triturate thoroughly.
3. Give one Bhavana each with all eight Kwath/Svaras over eight days.
4. Give 1 Bhavana with Malkangni Taila, then 1 each with Gandhaka Taila and Sarshapa Taila.
5. Form tablets of 250 mg.
6. Dry and store in a glass container.
7. This is called Prabhavati Vati.
anupana: Adraka Svaras, Dashamula Kwath, Pippali Churna

shloka:
हेमाभ्रालकतीक्ष्णताप्यकमलामेषां समं सप्तकं सूतञ्च द्विगुणं विशोधनबधूस्नुग्वह्निशौभाञ्जनात् ।
पाठाशूरणसिन्दुवारविजयैरण्डद्रवैर्मर्दितं तैलं काङ्गुणिगन्धकं कटु भवेत् कल्कं वटीं कल्पयेत् ।। १०४।।
प्रभावतीति कथिताऽऽर्द्रकद्रावैर्निषेविता । ततश्चानु पिबेत्तोयं दशमूलप्रसाधितम् ।।१०५।।
सपिप्पलीकं पिबतो जलं जयेत् । मरुद्विकारानुदराण्यपस्मृतिम् ।। १०६।।

name: Tryambakeshwar Ras
benefits: Useful in Ardhangavata (Hemiplegia) and Kampavata (Parkinsonism/Tremors).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	235 gm
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated copper	46 gm
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	235 gm
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Ginger + Black Pepper + Long Pepper	500 gm
preparation:
1. Triturate Parada and Gandhaka together firmly to make a proper Kajjali.
2. Add Tamra Bhasma and triturate. Then triturate with lemon juice.
3. Give one Bhavana with Tambula Patra Svaras (betel leaf juice) and form one large ball. Dry.
4. Seal in Sharava Samput with clay and cook in Bhudhara Puta for 5 hours.
5. Next day when cooled, remove and triturate. Add equal Trikatu Churna, triturate well. Store in glass. This is Tryambakeshwar Ras.

shloka:
सूतकस्य पलं पञ्च पलैकं ताम्रचूर्णकम् । जम्बीराणां द्रवैः पिष्टं सूततुल्यञ्च गन्धकम् ।। ११२।।
नागवल्लीदलैः पिष्टं ताम्रपिष्टं प्रकल्पयेत् । रुद्ध्वा लघुपुटैः पच्याद् भूधरे यामपञ्चकम् ।। ११३।।
आदाय चूर्णयेत्तुल्यैस्त्र्यूषणैः सममिश्रितैः । अङ्गिकम्पवातार्त्ता भक्षयेच्च द्विगुञ्जकम् ।।११४।।

name: Vaatgajankush Ras
benefits: Rapidly treats significantly both easily curable and difficult-to-cure Vata diseases of all kinds.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide (Cinnabar)	1 part
Loha Bhasma (लौहभस्म)	 Incinerated Iron	1 part
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 part
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment	1 part
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated  Iron Pyrite/Chalcopyrite 	1 part
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	1 part
Bhringaraja Churna (भृङ्गराजचूर्ण)	Eclipta alba powder	1 part
Shu. Vatsanabh (शु. वत्सनाभ)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	1 part
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Ginger + Black Pepper + Long Pepper	1 part
Agnimanth Churna (अग्निमन्थचूर्ण)	Premna mucronata powder	1 part
Shu. Tankana (शु. टङ्कण)	Purified Borax	1 part
preparation:
1. Triturate Rasa Sindura first. Add Gandhaka and Haritala and Triturate.
2. Add all remaining ingredients. Give Bhavana with  Gorakshamundi Kwath for 1 full day.
3. Give Bhavana with Nirgundi Patra Svaras for 1 full day.
4. Form tablets of 250 mg. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Vaatgajankush Ras.

shloka:
मृतं सूतं मृतं लोहं गन्धकं तालमाक्षिकम् । पथ्याभृङ्गीविषं व्योषमग्निमन्थञ्च टङ्कणम् ।।११७।।
तुल्यं खल्ले दिनं मद्यं मुण्डीनिर्गुण्डिजैर्द्रवैः । द्विगुञ्जां वटिकां खादेत् सर्ववातप्रशान्तये ।।
साध्यासाध्यं निहन्त्याशु रसो वातगजाङ्कुशः ।। ११८।।

name: Vaatvidhvansan Ras
benefits: Useful in 80 types of Vata disorders, Gulma, Shula, abdominal diseases, bloating, Anaha, Visuchika, Mandagni, Aamdosha, Grahani, asthma, cough, worm infestations, joint stiffness, neck rigidity, fever, diarrhea, hemorrhoids and Tridoshaja diseases.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Abhraka Satva Bhasma (अभ्रकसत्वभस्म)	Purified Mica extract	10 gm
Kansya Bhasma (कांस्यभस्म)	Incinerated Bronze	20 gm
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated copper	30 gm
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	50 gm
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment	60 gm
Shu. Vatsanabhi Vishachu.	Purified Aconite powder (1/16th of total)	13 gm

Bhavana Dravya
Panchakola Phanta
Chitraka Mula Kwath
Varuna-adi Gana Kwath
preparation:
1. Triturate first six ingredients together. Add Eranda Taila and triturate for 7 days to form a large ball.
2. Separately triturate 100 gm Shu. Haritala with lemon juice. Apply as half-finger coating over the ball.
3. When dry, seal in Sharava Samput and heat in Baluka Yantra for 22 Prahars (36 hours).
4. When cooled, remove and triturate into fine cloth-filtered powder.
5. Give 7 rounds each with Panchakola Phanta, Chitraka Mula Kwath, and Varuna-adi Gana Kwath.
6. Add Shu. Vatsanabhi Vishachu.
7. Form tablets of 375 mg, dry in shade, and store in glass.

shloka:
'मृतमभ्रकसत्त्वं च कांस्यं शुल्वं हि माक्षिकम् । गन्धकं तालकं सर्वं भागोत्तरविवर्धितम् ।। ८९ ।।
तत्सर्वं कज्जलीकृत्य वातारिस्नेहसंयुतम् । मर्दयेत्सप्तदिवस गोलीकृत्य तु यत्नतः ।।१०।।
निम्बुद्रवेण सम्पिष्टं तालकल्केन लेपयेत् । अर्द्धाङ्गुलदलञ्चैव परिशोष्य प्रयत्नतः ।।११।।
प्रपचेद्वालुकायन्त्रे यामानां द्वादशावधि । पटचूर्ण विधायैतद्भावयेतदनन्तरम् ।।९२।।
पञ्चकोलकचित्राङ्गिवरुणादिकषायतः । दशमूलकषायेण शृङ्गवेररसेन च ।।९३।।
रक्तामृतं कलांशेन दत्त्वा निष्पिष्य यत्नतः । स्थूलकोलास्थितुलितां छायाशुष्कां वटीं किरेत् ।। ९४।।
तत्तद्रोगहरैर्द्रव्यैर्नृणां देया सदा हिता । हन्यादशीतिधा भिन्नान् वातजातान् महागदान् ।। ९५।।
गुल्मानष्टविधांश्चापि शूलानष्टविधानपि । जठरस्य रुजः सर्वास्तथा च मलनिग्रहम् ।।९६ ।।
आध्मानकमथाऽऽ नाहं विसूचीं मन्दवह्निताम् । आमदोषानशेषांश्च दाहं छर्दिश्ञ्च दुर्द्धराम् ।।९७।।
ग्रहणीं श्वासकासौ च कृमिरोगमशेषतः । हन्यात् सर्वाङ्गसदनं मन्यास्तम्भञ्च वाजिनाम् ।।१८।।
ज्वरे चैवातिसारे च मूलरोगे त्रिदोषजे । पथ्यं रोगानुरूपेण दापनीयं भिषग्वरैः ।।९९।।
श्रीमता नन्दिना प्रोक्तो वातविध्वंसनो रसः । क्षुधार्थिभिः सदा सेव्यः सर्वाहारपरैर्नरैः ।। १००।।
Source Document : 6 aamvat- vrakodari vati.pdf
सूतगन्धकतीक्ष्णाभैः सताप्यैः समभागिकै । रसांशमपरं सर्वं षट्कोलं जीरकद्वयम् ।। १०१ ।।
सौवर्चलं ससिन्धूत्थं विडङ्गञ्च हरीतकी । अम्लवेतसकं सर्वं, बीजपूराम्बुमर्दितम् ।।
गुटिकास्तेन कल्केन कार्याः कोलास्थिमात्रकाः ।।१०२।।
योगिन्या बहुघातिनामयुतया त्रैलोक्यविख्यातया निर्दिष्टा हि वृकोदरीति गुटिका सोष्णाम्बुना सेविता ।।
निः शेषानिलदोषरोगजरुजः श्लेष्मामरोगोद्भवं । मन्दाग्निं ग्रहणीं चतुर्विधमहाजीर्णञ्च तूर्णं जयेत् ।। १०३।।

name: Vrikodari Vati
benefits: Rapidly cures: all Vataroga, Kafaroga, Aamaroga, Mandagni, Sangrahani, and all four types of Mahajirna
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
Tiksna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	Equal part
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Iron Pyrite/Chalcopyrite	Equal part
Shatkola (षट्कोल)	Six pungents: Pippali, Pippali Mula, Chavya, Chitraka, Shunthi, Maricha	Equal part
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder	Equal part
Pippali Mula Churna (पिप्पलीमूलचूर्ण)	Long Pepper root powder	Equal part
Chavya Churna (चव्यचूर्ण)	Piper chaba powder	Equal part
Chitraka Mula Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	Equal part
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण)	Dry Ginger powder	Equal part
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	Equal part
Shveta Jeera Churna (श्वेतजीराचूर्ण)	White Cumin powder	Equal part
Shyama Jeera Churna (श्यामजीराचूर्ण)	Black Cumin powder	Equal part
Sauvarchala Lavana (सौवर्चललवण)	Black Salt	Equal part
Saindhava Churna (सैन्धवचूर्ण)	Rock Salt powder	Equal part
Vidanga Churna (विडङ्गचूर्ण)	Embelia ribes powder	Equal part
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	Equal part
Amlavetak Churna (अम्लवेतसचूर्ण)	Garcinia pedunculata powder	Equal part
Bijapura Nimbu Ras (बिजौरानिम्बुरस)	Citron juice — for Bhavana	As required
preparation:
1. Triturate Parada and Gandhaka to make proper Kajjali. Add the three Bhasmas and triturate.
2. Add all 12 herbal powders and both Lavanas and mix.
3. Give Bhavana with Bijapura Nimbu Ras (citron juice).
4. Form tablets of 500 mg (4 Ratti).
5. Dry and store in glass.
6. This is Vrikodari Vati.

name: Aamvateshwar Ras
benefits: . Treats significantly all digestive system disorders. Rapidly cures both curable and incurable, acute and chronic Aamvata. Also beneficial for: Gulma, Arsha, Grahani, Shotha, Pandu, Udara Roga and more.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	2 Tola (24 gm)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated copper	2 Tola (24 gm)
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 Tola (12 gm)
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	 Incinerated Iron	1 Tola (12 gm)
preparation:
1. Make Kajjali from Parada and Gandhaka. Add Bhasmas and mix.
2. Give 7 Bhavanas with Eranda Patra Ras (castor leaf juice).
3. Give 20 Bhavanas with Panchakola Kwath (Pippali, Pippali Mula, Chavya, Chitraka, Shunthi). Dry repeatedly in sunlight.
4. Give 10 Bhavanas with Giloya (Tinospora cordifolia) juice.
5. Add equal Sohaga ka Phula (purified borax), half-part Vidala Vana, Kali Mirch, Imli ka Kshar, Dantimula 1-1 Tola, Shunthi, Kali Mirch, Pippali, Harad, Baheda, Amla, Laung at 6-6 Mashe each. Triturate together. (Ref: Rasayogasaar)
anupana: Butter or Ghee, followed by Nirgundi Ras or Eranda Mula Kwath

name: Martandeshwar Ras
benefits: Treats significantly: Vatavyadhi and 8 Maharoga (Vatavyadhi, Ashmari, Kushtha, Prameha, Udara Roga, Bhagandara, Arsha, Sangrahani). Also: Shwasa, Kaasa, Kshaya, Haleemak, Pandu, difficult fevers, Tridoshaja diseases, female infertility.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Svarna Makshika Churna (शु. स्वर्णमाक्षिकचूर्ण)	Incinerated Chalcopyrite powder	20 Pala (960 gm)
Shu. Kantaka Vedhi Tamra Patra (शु. कण्टकवेधीताम्रपत्र)	Purified thorn-pierced copper sheets	20 Pala (960 gm)
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide (Cinnabar)	46 gm
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	20 Pala (960 gm)
Hira Bhasma (हीराभस्म)	Incinerated Diamond 	3 gm
preparation:
1. In a small clay pot, spread Svarna Makshika powder, place Kantakavedi Tamra Patra on top, cover with more Svarna Makshika. Seal with Sharava Samput and fire in Gajaputa. Repeat 4 times.
2. Pound the processed Tamra Patra into fine powder. Add equal Shu. Svarna Makshika Churna. Triturate with lemon juice or Kanji, form discs, dry, seal and give Gajaputa. Repeat 20 times total.
3. Give 20 more Putas with Shuddha Gandhaka Churna and Nimbu Ras Bhavana.
4. Continue Bhavana with Nimbu Svaras and Gajaputa until Tamra + Makshika mixture reduces to 1 Pala.
5. Add Rasa Sindura 1 Pala and Hira Bhasma 3 gm. Triturate well. This is Martandeshwar Ras, by Acharya Lokanatha.

shloka:
समताप्ययुतं शुल्बं पलविंशतिमानकम् । प्रध्मातं हि चतुर्वारं खण्डयित्वा ततश्चरेत् ।।६२।।
तत्तुल्यमाक्षिकोपेतं पुटेविंशतिवारकम् । गन्धकेन पुटेत्तावद्यावत् पलमितं भवेत् ।।६३।।
क्षिपेत् पलमितं तत्र गन्धकेन हतं रसम् । शाणमात्रं मृतं वज्रं सर्वमेकत्र मर्दयेत् ।। ६४ ।।
इति सिद्धो रसेन्द्रोऽयं मार्तण्डेश्वरनामवान् । कीर्त्तितो लोकनाथेन लोकानां हितकाम्यया ।। ६५ ।।
मरीचघृतसंयुक्तः सेवितो मण्डलार्द्धतः । वाताद्यष्टमहारोगान् श्वासकासयुतं क्षयम् ।। ६६ । ।
हलीमकञ्च पाण्डुञ्च ज्वरानपि सुदुस्तरान् । इत्यादिकगदान् सर्वान् विनाशयति निश्चितम् ।। ६७ ।।
करोति दीपनं तीव्र दीप्तानलशतोपमम् । सन्निपातं जयत्याशु व्योषार्द्रकसमन्वितः ।।
सर्वसौख्यकरो नृणां स्त्रीणां बन्ध्यत्वनाशनः ।।६८।।

name: Svachhanda Bhairava Ras - 1
benefits: Treats significantly Vatavyadhi. Especially used in Vatarakta (gout).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Tiksna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	Equal part
Kaanta Loha Bhasma (कान्तलोहभस्म)	Magnetic Incinerated Iron	Equal part
Godanti Bhasma (गोदन्तीभस्म)	Gypsum/Selenite ash	Equal part
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Iron Pyrite	Equal part
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Ginger + Black Pepper + Long Pepper	Equal part
Agnimanth Churna (अग्निमन्थचूर्ण)	Premna mucronata powder	Equal part
Tulasi Panchanga Churna (तुलसीपञ्चाङ्गचूर्ण)	Holy Basil five-part powder	Equal part
Surana Kanda Churna (सूरणकन्दचूर्ण)	Amorphophallus tuber powder	Equal part
Kakdashringi Churna (काकड़ासिंगीचूर्ण)	Pistacia integerrima gall powder	Equal part
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	Equal part
Shu. Vatsanabhi Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	Equal part

Bhavana Dravya (Processing Substances)
Gorakshamundi Kwath	Sphaeranthus indicus decoction	3 Bhavanas
Nirgundi Patra Svaras	Vitex negundo leaf juice	3 Bhavanas
preparation:
1. Triturate Parada and Gandhaka to make Kajjali. Add all Bhasmas and herbal powders and triturate.
2. Give 3 Bhavanas each with Gorakshamundi Kwath and Nirgundi Patra Svaras.
3. Form tablets of 375 mg.
4. Dry in shade and store in glass.
5. This is Svachhanda Bhairava Ras.

shloka:
तीक्ष्णऽ यस्कान्तगोदन्तमाक्षिकैर्मर्दितो रसः । समांशगन्धकः पक्वो हण्डिकायन्त्रमध्यगः ।।१०७।।
व्योषाग्निमन्थसुरसाकन्दशृंग्यभयाविषैः । समैः समं त्र्यहं मुण्डीनिर्गुण्डीरसपिण्डितः ।।१०८।।
सेवितः शमयेद्वातान्नाम्ना स्वच्छन्दभैरवः । विशेषाद्वातरक्तं च द्विवल्लं चार्द्रकैर्ददेत् ।। १०९।।

name: Vaatgajendrasinh Ras
benefits: Treats significantly: 80 types of Vata disorders, 40 types of Pitta disorders, 20 types of Kapha disorders. Also cures: weakness from injury, hemiplegia, disease-related debility, old age weakness, weakness from excessive sexual activity. Acts as Vridhya (aphrodisiac), Ojavardhak (immune booster), Balya (strength tonic) and Rasayana (rejuvenative) for patients with weakened sensory organs, lost vitality and weak digestion. Increases muscle mass, brings mental happiness, prevents depletion of strength.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	1 Tola (12 gm)
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	1 Tola (12 gm)
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 Tola (12 gm)
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 Tola (12 gm)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated copper	1 Tola (12 gm)
Shataputi Naaga Bhasma (शतपुटी नागभस्म)	Hundred-fired Incinerated Lead	1 Tola (12 gm)
Sohaga ka Phula (सोहागे का फूला)	Purified Borax (Tankana Bhasma)	1 Tola (12 gm)
Shu. Bachhnaag (शु. बच्छनाग/वत्सनाभ)	Purified Aconitum ferox (milk-purified)	1 Tola (12 gm)
Saindhava Namak (सैंधानमक)	Rock Salt	1 Tola (12 gm)
Laung (लौंग)	Cloves (Syzygium aromaticum)	1 Tola (12 gm)
Bhooni Hing (भूनी हींग)	Roasted Asafoetida	1 Tola (12 gm)
Jayaphala (जायफल)	Nutmeg (Myristica fragrans)	1 Tola (12 gm)
Jeera (जीरा)	Cumin (Cuminum cyminum)	6 Mashe (7.5 gm)
Trisugandhis: Dalchini, Tejpat, Chhoti Elaichi	Cinnamon, Tejpatra, Small Cardamom	6 Mashe each
Trifala: Harad, Baheda, Amla	Terminalia chebula, T. bellirica, Emblica officinalis	6 Mashe each
preparation:
1. Combine Parada and Gandhaka to make Kajjali. Add Bhasmas, Bachhnaag, Sohage ka Phula and cloth-filtered powders of remaining herbs.
2. Mix progressively and triturate with Ghee Kunvar Ras (Aloe vera juice) in mortar for 3 days.
3. Form pills of 1 Ratti (125 mg) each.
4. Store in glass container.
5. Ref: Bhaisajyaratnavali.

name: Amrit Vati
benefits: Treats significantly Ajirna (indigestion), Kapha disorders and Vata diseases. Extremely powerful Deepan and Ruchivardhak.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Kutha Churna (कूठचूर्ण)	Saussuraea costus powder	1 part
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 part
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	1 part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	1 part
Trifala Churna (त्रिफलाचूर्ण)	Haritaki + Baheda + Amla powder	1 part
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Bhringaraja Svaras (भृङ्गराजस्वरस)	Eclipta alba juice — for Bhavana	As required
preparation:
1. In a clean stone mortar, Triturate Parada and Gandhaka together to make proper Kajjali.
2. Add Abhraka Bhasma and the fine powders of all other ingredients. Triturate well.
3. Give Bhavana (trituration) with Bhringaraja Svaras (Eclipta alba juice).
4. Form tablets the size of a Moong bean (approximately 250 mg). Dry in shade and store in glass.
5. This is called Amrit Vati.

कुष्ठागन्धविषव्योमत्रिफलापारदैः समैः । भृङ्गाम्बुमर्दितैर्मुद्गमानाऽमृतवटी शुभा ।।
अजीर्णश्लेष्मवातघ्नी दीपनी रुचिवर्धिनी ।।१३९।।

name: Ajirna Kantak Ras
benefits: Treats significantly Visuchika (severe cholera-like vomiting and purging) and all types of Ajirna Rog (indigestion).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	1 part
Gandhaka Churna (गन्धकचूर्ण)	Sulphur powder	1 part
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	3 parts
Kantakari Phala Drava (कण्टकारीफलद्रव)	Solanum xanthocarpum fruit juice — for Bhavana	As required
preparation:
1. Firmly Triturate Parada and Gandhaka in a stone mortar to make proper Kajjali.
2. Add Vatsanabha Vishachu. and Maricha Churna. Triturate together for 1 hour.
3. Give 21 Bhavanas with Kantakari Phala Ras and Triturate for 21 days.
4. Form tablets of 375 mg. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Ajirna Kantak Ras.

shloka:
शुद्धसूतं विषं गन्धं समं सर्वविचूर्णितम् । मरिचं सर्वतुल्यांशं कण्टकार्य्याः फलद्रवैः ।। ९९।।
मर्दयेद् भावयेत्सर्वमेकविंशतिवारकम् । वटीं गुञ्जात्रयीं खादेत्सर्वाजीर्णप्रशान्तये ।।१००।।
अजीर्णकण्टकः सोऽयं रसो हन्ति विसूचिकाम् । वारिणा तिलपर्युत्थमूलं पिष्ट्वा पिबेदनु ।। १०१ ।।

name: Jivannama Ras
benefits: Kindles Jatharagni and treats significantly: all Ajirna, Kapha-Vata disorders, Pandu, Kamala, Haleemak, Shotha, Shula and Mandagni.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	2 parts
Saindhava Lavana (सैन्धवलवण)	Rock Salt	3 parts
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder	4 parts
Shu. Tankana (शु. टङ्कण)	Purified Borax	5 parts
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	6 parts
Chitraka Churna (चित्रकचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	7 parts
Hiyavali / Pippali Vishesh (हियावली)	Special Long Pepper variety	8 parts
Kataka Phala Churna (कतकफलचूर्ण)	Strychnos potatorum (clearing nut) powder	9 parts
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox — 1/16th of total	3 gm
Bhavana Dravya (Processing Substances)
Brhati Svaras	Solanum indicum juice	As required
Ardraka Svaras	Fresh ginger juice	As required
Hingu Drava	Asafoetida liquid	As required
Punarnava Svaras	Boerhavia diffusa juice	As required
Pooti Chharna Ras	Fermented liquid	As required
Karanja Patra Svaras	Pongamia pinnata leaf juice	As required
Guduchi Svaras	Tinospora cordifolia juice — final repeated Bhavanas	As required
preparation:
1. Triturate Parada and Gandhaka firmly to make proper Kajjali. Add all powders in their proportions.
2. Give successive Bhavanas one each with all Bhavana Dravyas listed above.
3. Add Shu. Vatsanabha Churna 3 gm (1/16th of total). Give repeated Bhavanas with Guduchi Svaras.
4. Form tablets of 500 mg. Dry and store in glass. To be used by a wise Vaidya at 1-2 tablets. This is Jivana Ras.

shloka:
रसगन्धौ सिन्धुकणाटङ्कणमभयाग्निहियावलीकतकफलम् । क्रमशोत्तरञ्च विचूर्णितया बृहतीरससंयुतभावनया ।।१४२।।
आर्द्रकहिङ्गुपुनर्नवपूतिच्छिन्नरसैः क्रमशस्तु भावनया । तत्र कलांशविषञ्च विमिश्रय तद्रसमानं मानविधया ।।१४३।।
सर्वमजीर्ण कफमारुतपाण्डुशोफहलीमककामलाशूलम् । नाशयते ह्युदराग्निकरोऽयं दीपनजीवननामरसेन्द्रः ।।१४४।।

name: Kravyad Ras
benefits: Treats significantly Arsha (hemorrhoids) and Shula Roga (colic), treats significantly Gulma, Pleeha Roga, Grahani, Vatagranthi and Udara Roga.
ingredients:
Ingredients (Ghatak)
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	93 gm
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	46 gm
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper	12 gm
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	12 gm
preparation:
1. Make proper Kajjali from Parada and Gandhaka. Add Tamra and Loha Bhasma and Triturate briefly.
2. Take 2-3 kg fresh cow dung, form cylindrical ball (one Vitasti wide, 3-4 fingers thick). Place 3-4 Eranda (castor) leaves on it. Wrap 250 gm cow dung in Eranda leaves to make separate bundle.
3. In a small iron ladle, add 3-4 drops Gau Ghrita and heat on low flame. Add 20 gm Kajjali, stir continuously with small spoon. In 1-2 minutes Kajjali melts — keep stirring.
4. When it forms a ball, place on Eranda leaves on top of cow dung ball and press with the separate Gomaya bundle. This creates flat solidified Kajjali crust (Papdi).
5. Triturate Papdi in mortar, place in iron Kadahi, add 3 litres Jambiri Nimbu Svaras (lemon juice), cook on low flame.
6. When lemon juice dries, give 50-50 Bhavanas alternately with Panchakola Phanta and Amlavetak Kwath.
7. Add equal weight of roasted Shu. Tankana and all remaining powders equally. Add half-part Sauvarchala Lavana. Add black pepper equal to all combined.
8. Give 7 Bhavanas with Chanaka Kshara Vari (chickpea alkali water).
9. Form tablets of 375 mg. Dry in shade and store in glass.
anupana: Amla Takra with Lavana (sour salted buttermilk)

shloka:
द्विपलं गन्धकं शुद्धं द्रावयित्वा विनिक्षिपेत् । पारदं पलमानेन मृतशुल्बायसं पुनः ।।१२२।।
तोलमानेन संक्षिप्य पञ्चाङ्गुलदलं क्षिपेत् । ततो विचूर्ण्य यत्नेन निक्षिप्यायसभाजने ।। १२३।।
चुल्ल्यां निवेश्य यत्नेन ज्वालयेन्मृदुवह्निना । पात्रमात्रं हि जम्बीररसं सम्यग्विजारयेत् ।।१२४।
सञ्श्रूर्ण्य पञ्चकोलोत्थैः कषायैः साम्लवेतसैः । भावनाः खलु कर्तव्याः पञ्चाशत्प्रमितास्ततः ।।१२५।।
भृष्टटङ्कणचूर्णेन तुल्येन सह मेलयेत् । तदर्द्ध कृष्णलवणं सर्वतुल्यं मरीचकम् ।। १२६ ।।
सप्तधा भावयेत्पश्चाच्चणकक्षारवारिणा । ततः संशोष्य सम्पेष्य कूपिकाजठरे क्षिपेत् ।।१२७।।
अत्यर्थं गुरुमांसानि गुरुभोज्यान्यनेकशः । भुक्त्वा च कण्ठपर्यन्तं चतुर्दल्लमितं रसम् ।। १२८ ।।
पट्वम्लतक्रसहितं पिबेत्तदनुपानतः । क्षिप्रं तज्जीर्यते भुक्तं जायते दीपनं पुनः ।।१२९।।
रसः क्रव्यादनामाऽयं प्रोक्तो मन्थानभैरवः । सिङ्घणक्षौणिपालस्य भूरिमांसप्रियस्य च ।
दिष्टो ग्रामं समासाद्य भैरवानन्दद्योगिना ।।१३०।।
कुर्याद्दीपनमुद्धतं च पचनं दुष्टामसंशोषणं तन्दुस्थौल्यनिबर्हणं गरहरं मूलार्तिशूलापहम् ।
गुल्मप्लीहविनाशनं ग्रहणिकाविध्वंसनं स्रंसनं वातग्रन्थिमहोदरापहरणं क्रव्यादनामा रसः ।।१३१।।

name: Rajsekhar Vati
benefits: Treats significantly Mandagni, cures many types of Mahajwara and pain, eradicates root causes of disease, cures Pandu Roga, Udara Roga, Shula, Shotha, Vata Vikar and Kafaja Roga. Deepan-Pachan medicine.
ingredients:
Ingredients (Ghatak)
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide (Cinnabar)	1 part
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	2 parts
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka Churna (शु. गन्धकचूर्ण)	Purified Sulphur powder	1 part
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Ginger + Black Pepper + Long Pepper powder	1 part
Tambula Patra Svaras (ताम्बूलपत्रस्वरस)	Betel leaf juice — for Bhavana	As required
Svarna Dhattura Drava (स्वर्णधतूरजद्रव)	Golden Datura juice — for Bhavana	As required
preparation:
1. In a clean stone mortar, first Triturate Rasa Sindura thoroughly.
2. Add Shuddha Gandhaka and Triturate. Add fine powders of all other ingredients and mix.
3. Give one Bhavana with Tambula Patra Svaras. When dry, give one Bhavana with Dhattura Patra Svaras.
4. Form tablets of 250 mg. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Rajsekhar Vati.

shloka:
८. राजशेखरवटी
भागो मृतरसस्यैको वत्सनाभांशकद्वयम् । रसतुल्यं शिवाचूर्णं गन्धकं त्र्यूषणं तथा ।।१३२।।
विचूर्य्यातिप्रयत्नेन भावयेत्सप्तवासरम् । ताम्बूलपत्रतोयेन स्वर्णधुस्तूरजद्रवैः ।
पिष्ट्वा चणमिताः कुर्याच्छायाशुष्कास्तु गोलिकाः ।।१३३।।
उष्णाम्भोयुतराजशेखरवटी मन्दाग्निनिर्णाशिनी नानाकारमहाज्वरार्तिशमनी निःशेषमूलापहा ।
पाण्डुव्याधिमहोदरातिशमनी शूलान्तकृत्पाचनी शोफघ्नी पवनार्त्तिनाशनपटुः श्लेष्मामयध्वंसिनी ।।१३४।।

name: Raksha Ras
benefits: Ajirna (Indigestion)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	Equal part
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Ginger + Black Pepper + Long Pepper powder	Equal part
Tiksna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	 Incinerated Iron	Equal part
Souvarchala Lavana (सौवर्चललवण)	Black Salt	Equal part
Rakta Punarnava Kshar (रक्तपुनर्नवाक्षार)	Alkali of Red Boerhavia diffusa	Equal part
Matulunga Nimbu Svaras (मातुलुङ्गनिम्बुस्वरस)	Citron/Lemon juice — for Bhavana	As required
dose: 500 mg to 1 gm (1 Ratti to 8 Ratti)
preparation:
1. In a stone mortar, firmly Triturate Parada and Gandhaka to make proper Kajjali.
2. Add Tamra Bhasma and remaining powders. Triturate well.
3. Fill this powder in a clay-sealed Kachkupi (glass bottle) and cook in Baluka Yantra (sand bath) for 24 hours.
4. When cooled, remove the medicine. Triturate in mortar and add equal quantity of Rakta Punarnava Kshar.
5. Give 7 Bhavanas with Matulunga Nimbu Svaras (lemon/citron juice). Triturate well.
6. Form tablets of 500 mg. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is called Raksha Ras.

shloka:
ताम्र पारदगन्धकौ त्रिकटुकं तीक्ष्णं च सौवर्चलं खल्ले मर्छ दृढं विधाय सिकताकुम्भेऽष्टयामं ततः ।
स्विन्नं तस्य च रक्तशाकिनिभवं क्षारं समं मेलयेत् सर्वं भावितमातुलुङ्गजरसैर्नाम्ना रसो राक्षसः ।।१४०।।
मन्दाग्नौ सततं ददीत मुनये प्रातः पुरा शङ्करः सख्येऽस्मै च्यवनाय मन्दहुतभुग्वर्य्याय नष्टौजसे ।
तेनादाय समस्तलोकगुरवे सूर्याय तस्मै नमो । मत्र्यानामपि चास्य दानसमये गुञ्जाष्टकं वर्जयेत् ।।१४१।।

name: Vadvagni Ras
benefits: This medicine makes the Jatharagni (gastric fire) as powerful as the Vadavagni (submarine fire). Indicated for Ajirna and Visuchika.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Tankana (शु. टङ्कण)	Purified Borax	35 gm
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	35 gm
Shu. Tutya (शु. तुत्य)	Purified Copper Sulphate (Blue Vitriol)	35 gm
Kaanta Loha Bhasma (कान्तलोहभस्म)	Magnetic Incinerated Iron	36 gm
Shu. Mandura Bhasma (शु. मण्डूरभस्म)	Incinerated Purified Iron Rust/Iron Oxide	90 gm
preparation:
1. Triturate Kaanta Loha Bhasma with Kamala Pushpa Ras (lotus flower juice) and give Gajaputa (firing). Give 7 Putas in this manner.
2. Then give Bhavana with Trifala Kwath and fire in Gajaputa 7 more times.
3. Mandura Bhasma should also be given Bhavana with Bhringaraja Svaras (Eclipta alba juice) and 7 Putas in Gajaputa, before adding to this formulation.
4. Combine all five processed ingredients together, Triturate thoroughly, and store in a glass container.
5. This is called Vadvagni Ras.

shloka:
टङ्कणं मरिचं तुत्थं पृथक् कर्षत्रयं भवेत् । सुन्दरं द्वादशं निष्कं त्रिंशन्निष्कमयोमलम् ।।१०५।।
कान्तं पद्मरसे घृष्टं पुटपक्कं वरारसे । मार्कवस्वरसे घृष्टं सप्तकृत्वस्त्वयोमलम् ।।१०६ ।।
चूर्णान्येतानि संयोज्य स्थापयेच्छुद्धभाजने । शुद्धदेहो नरस्तस्य पानं यद्भोजनोत्तरम् ।।१०७।।
अद्यात्पथ्यं ततः स्वल्पं ततस्ताम्बूलभाग्भवेत् । उदराग्निर्नरस्यास्य वडवाग्निसमो भवेत् ।।
बहुनात्र किमुक्तेन रसायनमयं नृणाम् ।।१०८।।

name: Vadvamukhi Vati
benefits: Treats significantly all diseases, treats significantly all Kapha disorders, eliminates cough, asthma, heart diseases, colic, irregular hunger, Gulma (abdominal tumors), root pain, swelling (Shotha) and all diseases.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	1 part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	1 part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	1 part
Vidanga Churna (विडङ्गचूर्ण)	Embelia ribes powder	1 part
Kilihari Churna (किलिहारीचूर्ण)	Gloriosa superba powder	1 part
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Ginger + Black Pepper + Long Pepper powder	1 part
Sugandhavasa Churna (सुगन्धवासाचूर्ण)	Adhatoda vasica (Malabar nut) powder	1 part
Nimba Patra Churna (निम्बपत्रचूर्ण)	Neem leaf powder	1 part
Haridra Churna (हरिद्राचूर्ण)	Turmeric powder	1 part
Saindhava Churna (सैन्धवचूर्ण)	Rock Salt powder	1 part
Shu. Vatsanabhi Vishachu. (शु. वत्सनाभिविषचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	1 part
Bhavana Dravya (Processing Substances)
Bhringaraja Svaras	Eclipta alba (false daisy) juice	As required
Kupila Kwath	Decoction of Strychnos nux-vomica (poison nut)	As required
Ardraka Svaras	Fresh ginger juice	As required
preparation:
1. In a clean stone mortar, combine all ingredients from Tamra Bhasma to Shu. Vatsanabhi Vishachu.
2. Sieve through cloth to get fine powder.
3. Give 1-1 Bhavana with Bhringaraja Svaras, Kupila Kwath and Ardraka Svaras.
4. Form tablets of 125 mg each. Dry thoroughly in shade and store in a glass container.
5. This is called Vadvamukhi Vati.

shloka:
शुल्बायोघनभस्मवेल्लहलिनीव्योषाम्बुनिम्बच्छदैः संयुक्तैश्च हरिद्रया समलवैः सार्द्ध सशुभ्रामृतैः ।
भृङ्गाम्भोविषतिन्दुकार्द्रकरसैः सम्पिष्य गुञ्जामिता संशुष्का वडवामुखीति गुटिका नाम्नोदिता तारया ।।१०९।।
क्षिप्रं क्षुत्परिबोधिनी खलु मता सर्वामयध्वंसिनी श्लेष्मव्याधिविधूननी कसनहृच्छ्वासापहा शूलनुत् ।
क्षुद्वैषम्यहरा च गुल्मशमनी मूलार्तिमूलङ्कषा शोफव्याधिहराऽत्र किं बहुगिरा सर्वामयोत्सादिनी ।।११०।।

name: Vaishwanar Pottali Ras
benefits: Vaishwanar Pottali Ras provides extremely powerful digestive fire (Teevra Agni Deepti). It treats significantly all diseases arising from Mandagni (weak digestive fire) and their associated conditions. It is Deepana (digestive stimulant), Snigdha (unctuous/soothing) and extremely beneficial for Mandagni conditions.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	12 gm (1 Karsha)
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	12 gm (1 Karsha)
Varatika Bhasma (वराटिकाभस्म)	Incinerated Cowrie shell 	12 gm
preparation:
1. In a clean stone mortar, firmly Triturate Parada and Gandhaka to make proper Kajjali.
2. Add Varatika Bhasma (cowrie shell ash) and Triturate together.
3. Add Gau Dugdha (cow's milk) and Triturate for one full day.
4. Form one large ball, dry thoroughly. Place in a Musha (clay crucible), seal with Sandhi Bandhana (clay sealing) and subjected to heat in Kumbhiputa (pot firing).
5. When completely cooled (Svanga Sheetal), remove the medicine, Triturate in mortar.
6. Give Bhavana with Gau Dugdha (cow's milk) or Jala (water).
7. Form tablets of 3-3 Ratti = 375 mg each. Dry completely in shade and store in glass.
8. This is called Vaishwanar Pottali Ras — named by King Singhana and guided by Bhairavanda Yogi.

shloka:
शुद्धौ सूतबली चराचररजः कर्षांशतः कज्जलीम् । कृत्वा गोपयसा विमर्घ दिवसं रुद्ध्वा च मूषोदरे ।। १११।।
सिद्धं कुम्भिपुटे स्वतश्च शिशिरा पिष्टा करण्डे स्थिता । स्याद्वैश्वानरपोटलीति कथिता तीव्राग्निदीप्तिप्रदा ।। ११२।।
एकोनविंशतेश्श्रूर्णैर्मरिचानां घृतान्वितैः । देयेयं वल्लमानेन वयोबलमवेक्ष्यताम् ।। ११३।।
गिलेद्गलविशुद्ध्यर्थ दधिभक्तमनुत्तमम् । कवलत्रयमानेन दुर्गन्धोद्गारशान्तये ।। ११४ ।।
मध्यन्दिने ततो भोज्यं घृततक्रोपदंशयुक् । रात्रौ च पयसा सार्धं यद्वा रोगानुसारतः ।।११५।।
विदाहि द्विदलं भूरिलवणं तैलपाचितम् । बिल्वं च कारवेल्लं च वृन्ताकं काञ्जिकं त्यजेत् ।। ११६ ।।
इयं हि पोटली प्रोक्ता सिंघणेन महीभृता । मन्दाग्निप्रभवाशेषरोगसङ्घातघातिनी ।।११७।।
सिंघणस्य विनिर्दिष्टा भैरवानन्दयोगिना । लोकनाथोक्तपोटल्या उपचारा इह स्मृताः ।
पोटल्यो दीपनाः स्निग्धाः मन्दाग्नौ नितरां हिताः ।।११८।।

name: Visuchika Vidhvansan Ras - 1
benefits: Visuchika Vidhvansan Ras treats significantly Visuchika (severe cholera-like condition with vomiting, purging, abdominal cramps and weakness).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Gandhaka Churna (शु. गन्धकचूर्ण)	Purified Sulphur powder	1 part
Shu. Tankana (शु. टङ्कण)	Purified Borax	1 part
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide (Cinnabar)	1 part
preparation:
1. In a mortar, Triturate Shu. Gandhaka and Shu. Tankana together for 2 hours.
2. Give 7 Bhavanas (triturations) with Jayaphala Phanta Drava (Nutmeg infusion liquid).
3. Add 1 part Rasa Sindura (Siddha Soota) and Triturate well.
4. Form tablets of 500 mg each. Dry completely in shade and store in a glass container.
5. Consuming this with Pisi Hui Mishri (powdered rock sugar/sugar candy) treats significantly Visuchika.
6. During treatment, eat: Takra (buttermilk) with rice (Takra Odana) and Vastuka Shaak (Bathua/Chenopodium album leaves).

Tankana (शु. टङ्कण)","englishName":"Purified Borax","quantity":"1 part"},{"sanskritName":"Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)","englishName":"Red Mercuric Sulphide (Cinnabar)","quantity":"1 part"}]
shloka:
विमर्घ गन्धोपलटङ्कणेन सम्भाव्य वारानथ सप्तजात्याः । तोयैः फलानामथ सिद्धसूतो विध्वंसनामा शमनो विसूच्या ।।१० २।।
अमुष्य गुञ्जा नव दापनीया हन्तुं विषूचीं सितया समेताः । तक्रौदनं स्यादिह भोजनाय पथ्यं च शाकं किल वास्तुकस्य ।। १०३ ।।

name: Amrit Ras
benefits: Treats significantlys: Amalpitta (hyperacidity), Agnimandya (weak digestive fire), Parinaama Shula (post-digestive pain), Kamala (jaundice) and Pandu Roga (anaemia).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	2 Karsha (24 gm)
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Ginger + Black Pepper + Long Pepper powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
Trifala Churna (त्रिफलाचूर्ण)	Haritaki + Baheda + Amla powder	1 Pala (12 gm) each
Nagara Motha / Mushta (नागरमोथा)	Cyperus rotundus (nut grass) powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
Vidanga Churna (विडङ्गचूर्ण)	Embelia ribes powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
Chitraka Churna (चित्रकचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
preparation: 1. Make Kajjali by Triturateing Parada and Gandhaka firmly together.\n2. Add fine powders of Trikatu, Trifala, Mushta, Vidanga and Chitraka. Triturate all together and store.
anupana: Honey and ghee,then cold water, then cow's milk

reference: Bharat Bhaishajya Ratnakara-part 1- verse 319- page no. 115
shloka:
कर्षद्वयं गन्धकस्य तदर्ध पारदस्य च ॥
त्रिकटु त्रिफला मुस्ता विडङ्गं चित्रकं तथा ॥
एषां सञ्चूर्णितानां च प्रत्येकं तु पलं भवेत् ॥
बिडालपदमात्रं तु लिह्यात्तन्मधुसर्पिषा ।।
शीतोदकं चानुपिवेत्क्रमाङ्गव्यं पयस्तथा ॥
अम्लपित्तमग्निमांद्यं परिणामरुजं तथा ।।
कामलां पाण्डुरोगं च हन्यादमृतको रसः ।॥

name: Amalpitta Antak Ras
benefits: Amalpitta (Hyperacidity / Acid Peptic Disease)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasa Sindura / Mruta Soota (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	Equal part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	Equal part
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder — equal to all above combined	Equal to total
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — for administration	As required
preparation:
1. Take equal parts of Rasa Sindura, Abhraka Bhasma and Loha Bhasma. Triturate all three together.
2. Add Haritaki Churna equal to the total combined weight. Triturate together and store in glass.

shloka:
मृतसूताम्रलौहानां तुल्यां पथ्यां विमर्दयेत् ।
माषमात्रं लिहेत्क्षौद्रैरम्लपित्तप्रशान्तये ॥ १ ॥

name: Paniyabhakta Vatika
benefits: Amalpitta, Shula, Parshva Shula, Shwasa, Kaasa, Kushtha, Grahani
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Trivritta / Nisoth (त्रिवृता/निसोथ)	Operculina turpethum root powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
Mushta / Nagara Motha (मुस्ता/मोथा)	Cyperus rotundus powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
Haritaki Churna (हरड़)	Terminalia chebula powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
Baheda Churna (बहेड़ा)	Terminalia bellirica powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
Amla Churna (आँवला)	Emblica officinalis powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
Shunthi Churna (सोंठ)	Dry Ginger powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
Maricha Churna (मिर्च)	Black Pepper powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
Pippali Churna (पिप्पली)	Long Pepper powder	1 Pala (12 gm)
Shu. Parada (शु. पारा)	Purified Mercury	Half Pala (6 gm)
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Half Pala (6 gm)
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	  Incinerated Iron	2 Pala (24 gm)
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	2 Pala (24 gm)
Vidanga Churna (वायिविडंग)	Embelia ribes powder	2 Pala (24 gm)
Trifala Kwath (त्रिफलाकाढ़ा)	Trifala decoction — for tablet making	As required
preparation:
1. First make Kajjali from Parada and Gandhaka.
2. Triturate all ingredients together into fine powder.
3. Make Vatikas (tablets) by Triturateing the combined powder with Trifala Kwath.
4. Form Ratti-Ratti (approximately 125 mg) tablets. Store in glass.

shloka:
पानीयभक्तवटिका
त्रिवृता मुस्तकञ्चैव त्रिफला त्र्यूषणं तथा ।
प्रत्येकन्तु पलं भागं तदद्ों रसगन्धकौ ॥ ४ ॥
लौहाभ्रकविडङ्गानां प्रत्येकञ्च पलद्वयम् ।
एतत्सकलमादाय चूर्णयित्वा विचक्षणः ॥ ५ ॥
त्रिफलायाः कषायेण वटिकां कारयेद्भिषक् ।
एकैकां भक्षयेत्प्रातस्तक्रञ्चापि पिबेदनु ॥ ६ ॥
हन्ति शूलं पाश्र्वशूलं कुक्षिबस्तिगुदे रुजम् ।
श्वासं कासं तथा कुष्ठ ग्रहणीदोषनाशिनी ॥ ७ ॥

name: Agnimukha Tamra
benefits: Amalpitta, Kshaya, Shula, Jaratipta (chronic burning)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 Tola (12 gm)
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 Tola (12 gm)
Shu. Tamra Patra (शु. ताम्रपत्र)	Purified Copper sheets	2 Tola (24 gm)
Arjuna Tvak Kwath (अर्जुनकी छालका क्वाथ)	Terminalia arjuna bark decoction — for Bhavana	As required
Pancha Lavana Churna (पञ्चलवण चूर्ण)	Five salts powder — for covering	As required
Gular Patra (गूलरके पत्ते)	Ficus racemosa (cluster fig) leaves — for wrapping	As required
preparation:
1. Make Kajjali from 1-1 Tola of Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka.
2. Triturate Kajjali with Arjuna Tvak Kwath in a mortar.
3. Apply this Kajjali as coating on 2 Tola of Shu. Tamra Patra (purified copper sheets).
4. Wrap coated copper sheets in Gular (Ficus racemosa) leaves.
5. Encase in stone-lime powder and place in a clay Andha Musha (sealed crucible). Fire. When cooled, remove and Triturate the processed Tamra Bhasma. Store in glass. This is Agnimukha Tamra.

shloka:
गन्धकेनाक्षमात्रेण सूततुल्येन निम्मिता ।
कञ्जली या तया लेप्यं ताम्रपत्रन्तुतत्समम् ॥
अर्जुनत्वग्रसैः सार्द्ध पक्कोदुम्बरपल्लवे ।
आच्छाद्य पञ्चलवणैश्चूर्णैश्चापि च मृण्मये ॥
अन्धभूषागतं ध्मात तत्सिद्धं भक्षयेन्नरः ।
शाणकं रक्तिकावृद्ध्या मासमात्रं प्रयोगतः ॥
अम्लपित्तं क्षयं शूलं जरत्पित्तं सुदारुणम् ।
सप्तरात्रप्रयोगेण शरीरः निर्मलं भवेत् ॥

benefits: Amalpitta, Parinaama Shula, Shotha, Pandu, Gulma, Udara Roga — all diseases
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity

Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	  Incinerated Copper(Gajaputa-processed)	5 Tola (60 gm)

Amla (आमला)	Emblica officinalis powder	5 Tola (60 gm)

Remove and Triturate the Tamra Bhasma.\n2. Combine all powders in specified quantities. Triturate together with Ardraka Svaras (fresh ginger juice).\n3. Form tablets of 1-1 Masha (approximately 1 gm) each. Store in glass.

shloka:
शुद्धं सूतं पलार्धञ्च तत्समं शुद्धगन्धकम् ।
तयोः समं ताम्रपत्रं लिप्त्वा मूषान्तरे क्षिपेत् ।।
आच्छाद्य पञ्चलवणैर्लिप्त्वा गजपुटे पचेत् ।
सिद्धं ताघ्रं समादाय पलमेकं विमर्दयेत् ।।
पारदस्य पलञ्चैव गन्धकस्य पलन्तथा ।
पुटदग्धस्य लोहस्य गगनस्य पलंपलम् ।।
यमानी शतपुष्पा च त्रिकटु त्रिफलाऽपि च ।
त्रिवृता चविका दन्ती शिखरी जीरकद्वयम् ।।
एतेषां पलिकैर्भागैर्घण्टकर्णकमानकम् ।
ग्रन्थिकं चित्रकश्चैव कुलिशानां पलार्धकम् ।।
आर्द्रकस्वरसैः पिष्ट्वा गुटिकां माषकोन्मिताम् ।
पञ्चाननवटी ख्याता सर्वरोगविनाशिनी ।।
अम्लपित्तमहाव्याधिनाशिनी च रसायनी ।
महाऽग्निकारिका चैषा परिणामव्यथापहा ।।
शोथपाण्ड्डामयानाहप्लीगुल्मोदरापहा ।।

name: Kshudha Vati Gutika
benefits: Amalpitta (Hyperacidity) and related digestive disorders
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Manakanda (मानकन्द)	Arum campanulatum (elephant foot yam / wild taro)	Juice
Hadjod / Hadjoda (हड़जोड़ा)	Cissus quadrangularis (bone-setter)	Juice
Khandakarna / Kharkona (खण्डकर्ण / खारकोन)	A specific Ayurvedic herb	Juice
Chaulai (चौराई)	Amaranthus species (wild amaranth / pigweed)	Juice
Shalincha Shaak (शालिञ्चशाक)	Portulaca oleracea (purslane)	Juice
Kale Patte Ka Marsa (काले पत्तोंका मरसा)	Black-leaved Chenopodium album (bathua)	Juice
Shweta Punarnava (श्वेत पुनर्नवा)	White Boerhavia diffusa	Juice
Badi Kateri (बड़ी कटेरी)	Solanum indicum (Indian nightshade)	Juice
Bhangra / Bhringaraja (भाँगरा)	Eclipta alba (false daisy)	Juice
Lakshmana (लक्ष्मणा)	Ipomea species	Juice
Kesharaj (केशराज)	Eclipta prostrata (trailing eclipta)	Juice
preparation:
1. Soak Krishna Abhraka (black mica) overnight in freshly prepared Dhaan ki Kanji (rice fermented water).
2. In the morning, triturate in the same Kanji.
3. Give Bhavana (trituration) with juices of 11 medicinal plants: Manakanda, Hadjod, Khandakarna (Kharkona), Chaulai, Shalincha Shaak, Kale Marsa, Shweta Punarnava, Badi Kateri, Bhangra, Lakshmana and Keshraj.
4. Give Puta (firing in sealed furnace) many times — repeating this trituration and firing cycle.
5. Continue until Abhraka becomes Nishchandra Bhasma — i.e., the final ash has no mica-like sheen, is completely pure and fully processed.

shloka:
आशुभक्तोदकैः पिष्टमभ्रकं तत्र संस्थितम् ।
कन्दमाणास्थिसंहारखण्डकर्णर सैरथ
।। ८ ।।
तण्डुलीयकशालिञ्चकाकमारिषजेन च
॥ ६ ॥
वृञ्चीरबृहतीभृङ्गलक्ष्मणा केशराजकैः
पेषणं भावनं कुर्यात्पुटञ्चानेकशो भिषक् ।
यावन्निश्चन्द्रकं तत्स्याच्छुद्धिरेवं विहायसः ॥ १० ॥

name: Leela Vilas Ras
benefits: Amalpitta (Hyperacidity / GERD / Acid Peptic Disease)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper	1 part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	1 part
Raupya Bhasma (रौप्यभस्म)	Incinerated Silver	1 part
Bhavana Dravya (Processing Substances)	-	-
Trifala Kwath	Prepared from Bibhitaka (1 part), Amalaki (2 parts) and Haritaki (3 parts) — 8x water reduced to 1/8th	25 Bhavanas
Bhringaraja Svaras (भृंगराज स्वरस)	Eclipta alba juice	25 Bhavanas
preparation:
1. In a stone mortar, firmly Triturate Parada and Gandhaka to make Kajjali.
2. Add Tamra Bhasma, Abhraka Bhasma and Raupya Bhasma. Triturate all together.
3. Place in Sharava (earthen saucer), seal as Sharava Samput with clay, fire in Laghu Puta (small firing).
4. Prepare Trifala Kwath: take Bibhitaka 1 part, Amalaki 2 parts, Haritaki 3 parts — coarsely pound (Yavakuta) and boil in 8x water, reduce to 1/8th. Strain.
5. Give 25 Bhavanas of the fired material with this Trifala Kwath.
6. Then give 25 more Bhavanas with Bhringaraja Svaras (Eclipta alba juice).
7. Form tablets of 375 mg and dry in shade. Store in glass.

shloka:
शुद्धसूतं शुद्धगन्धं मृतं ताम्राभ्ररौप्यकम् । तुल्यांशं मर्दयेद्यामं रुध्वा लघुपुटे पचेत् ।। २०४।।
अक्षधात्रीहरीतक्याः क्रमवृद्धया विपाचयेत् । जलेनाष्टगुणेनैव ग्राह्यमष्टावशेषितम् ।। २०५।।
अनेन भावयेत्सर्वं पूर्व सूतं पुनः पुनः । पञ्चविंशतिवारं च तावद्भिर्भृङ्गजैर्द्रवैः ।। २०६ ।।
शुष्कं तच्चूर्णितं खादेत्पञ्चगुञ्ज मधुप्लुतम् । रसो लीलाविलासोऽयमम्लपित्तं नियच्छति ।। २०७।।

name: Pitta Roga Antak Ras
benefits:
Pitta Roga Antak Ras rapidly treats significantlys: Pitta disorders, Pitta Jwara (Pitta fever), Kshaya (wasting/tuberculosis), Daha (burning sensation throughout body), Trishna (excessive thirst), Bhrama (vertigo/dizziness) and Shosha (drying up/emaciation). It is called 'Pittantaka Ras' — the treats significantlyer of Pitta.
After-care: Drink Sita Kshira (sugar milk), or Yashtimadhu with sugar in water, or Chandana in cool water — all for Pitta pacification.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasa Sindura / Mruta Soota (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	Equal part
Munda Loha Bhasma (मुण्डलोहभस्म)	Munda type Incinerated Iron	Equal part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper	Equal part
Tiksna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	Equal part
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Chalcopyrite / Iron Pyrite ash	Equal part
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	Equal part
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
Bhavana Dravya (Processing Substances)	-	-
Yashtimadhu Kwath	Glycyrrhiza glabra (licorice) decoction	1 Bhavana
Draksha Svaras	Vitis vinifera (grape) juice	1 Bhavana
Amrita (Guduchi) Svaras	Tinospora cordifolia juice	1 Bhavana
Jala Mandipa Drava	Water hyacinth / aquatic plant liquid	1 Bhavana
Vasa Patra Ras	Adhatoda vasica (Malabar nut) leaf juice	1 Bhavana
Ksheeravidari Kanda Kwath	Pueraria tuberosa (milk tuber) decoction	1 Bhavana
preparation:
1. In a mortar, firmly Triturate Parada (within Rasa Sindura) and Gandhaka to make proper Kajjali. Add Haritala and Triturate. Then add all remaining Bhasmas and Triturate.
2. Give 1-1 Bhavana each with: Yashtimadhu Kwath, Draksha Svaras, Guduchi Svaras, Jala Mandipa Drava, Vasa Patra Ras and Ksheeravidari Kanda Kwath.
3. Triturate in mortar for one full day.
4. Add Chini (sugar) and Madhu (honey) and form tablets of 375 mg each. Dry in shade for several days (up to 1 month — the tablets take time to dry fully). Store in glass.
anupana: Chini Mishrit Gau Dugdha (sugar mixed cow's milk) or Yashtimadhu Kwath

shloka:
मृतसूता भ्रमुण्डार्कतीक्ष्णमाक्षिकतालकम् । गन्धकं च भवेत्तुल्यं यष्टीद्राक्षाऽमृताद्रवैः ।।२१८।।
जलमण्डपिकावासाद्रावैः क्षीरविदारिजैः । दिनैकं मर्दयेत्खल्ले सिताक्षौद्रयुता वटी ।। २१९ ।।
निष्कमात्रं निहन्त्याशु पित्तं पित्तज्वरं क्षयम् । दाहं तृष्णां भ्रमं शोषं वेगात्पित्तान्तको रसः ।। २२० ।।
सिताक्षीरं पिबेच्चानु यष्टीं सितान्वितां जलैः । पिबेद्वा पित्तशान्त्यर्थं शीततोयेन चन्दनम् ।। २२१ ।।

name: Tamradhruti Ras
benefits: Treats significantlys: Amalpitta, Kaasa, Kshaya, Shosha, Arsha, Grahani, Kamala, Pandu Roga, eleven types of Kushtha, Rakta Pitta, Khalitya (hair fall), Shula, Udara Roga, Vata Roga, Pratishyaya, Vidradhi, Vishama Jwara. Continuous use: treats significantlys wrinkles and greying of hair, makes the body copper-pure and free from all diseases.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Nepaliya Tamra Sukshma Patra (शु. नेपालीताम्र के सूक्ष्मपत्र)	Purified Nepalese copper fine sheets (Kantakavedi)	46 gm (1 Pala)
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	12 gm (1 Karsha)
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	23 gm (2 Karsha)
Bijaurana Nimbu Svaras (बिजौरानिम्बुस्वरस)	Citron / Lemon juice — for Kajjali making	As required
preparation:
1. Make Kajjali by firmly triturating Parada and Gandhaka in a stone mortar with Bijaurana Nimbu Svaras (lemon juice).
2. Make the Kajjali into a paste (like mud).
3. Apply this paste as coating on all the Nepaliya Tamra Sukshma Patra (fine Nepalese copper sheets) — Kantakavedi type.
4. Place the coated copper sheets in a stone mortar and expose to harsh direct sunlight for 3 hours. Within 3 hours, the Kajjali will dissolve into and amalgamate with the copper. This is a guaranteed process.
5. The resulting amalgamated copper is Tamradhruti. This is the medicine.
anupana: Madhu (Honey) and Sarpi (Ghee); follow with Takra or Dhaanyamla

shloka:
पलं नेपालशुल्बस्य पत्राणि सुतनूनि च । कृत्वा कण्टकवेध्यानि कारयेत्तदनन्तरम् ।।२०८।।
कबैंकं द्विगुणं ग्राह्यं क्रमात्सूतकगन्धयोः । मर्दितव्यं शिलाखल्ले रसैर्दन्तशठस्य वै ।।२०९।।
तत्कल्कं पङ्कवत्कृत्वा तेन पर्णानि सर्वशः । लेपयित्वा शिलाखल्ले स्थापयेदातपे खरे ।। २१० ।।
यामैकेन समुद्धृत्य द्रवीभवति नान्यथा । वान्तिं विरेचनं कृत्वा शुद्धकायो यथाविधि ।। २११।।
पूजयित्वा सुरान्वैद्यान्विप्रान्हेमाम्बरादिभिः । तां द्रुतिं मधुसर्पिर्थ्यां रक्तिकामाषकादिभिः ।। २१२।।
लीढ्वा तत्र पिबेत्तक्रं धान्याम्लकमथापि वा । जीर्णे सायं समश्नीयाच्छाल्यन्नं तु पुरातनम् ।। २१ ३ ।।
सेव्यमानं निहन्त्येतदम्लपित्तं सुदारुणम् । कासं क्षयं तथा शोषमर्शासि ग्रहणीं तथा ।।२१४।।
कामलां पाण्डुरोगं च कुष्ठान्येकादशैव च । रक्तपित्तं सखालित्यं शूलं चैवोदराणि च ।। २१५।।
वातरोगं प्रतिश्यायं विद्रधिं विषमज्वरम् । सन्तताभ्यासयोगेन वलीपलितनाशनम् ।। २१६ ।।
ताम्रवत्कुरुते देहं सर्वव्याधिविवर्जितम् । जीवेद्वर्षशतं सायं द्वितीय इव भास्करः ।।२१७।।

name: Triphaladi Mandura
benefits: Consuming Triphaladi Mandura treats significantlys Amalpitta (hyperacidity/acid peptic disease/GERD).
ingredients:
Ingredients — Primary
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Bahuvarsheek Mandura (बहुवार्षिक मण्डूर)	Many-years-old Iron Rust (Mandura Bhasma)	Base ingredient
Misri (मिश्री)	Sugar Candy / Rock Sugar	Equal to Mandura
Ghee (घी)	Ghee	Equal to Mandura
Shahad (शहद)	Honey	Equal to Mandura

Bhavana Dravyas (Processing Herb Juices — one each)
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Trifala (त्रिफला)	Haritaki + Baheda + Amla	Juice/Kwath — 1 Bhavana
Kundali (कुण्डली)	A climbing herb	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Bhangra / Bhringaraja (भंगरा)	Eclipta alba (false daisy)	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Kala Bhangra (काला भंगरा)	Black variety Eclipta	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Adoosa / Vasa (अड़ूसा/बासा)	Adhatoda vasica (Malabar nut)	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Shatavar (शतावर)	Asparagus racemosus	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Mundi (मुण्डी)	Sphaeranthus indicus	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Bala / Kharaiti (बाला/खरैटी)	Sida cordifolia	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Patol (पटोल)	Trichosanthes dioica (pointed gourd)	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Pittapapda (पित्तपापड़ा)	Fumaria parviflora (earth smoke)	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Bhargi (भारग्नी)	Clerodendrum serratum	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Chirayata (चिरायता)	Swertia chirata (Kirata Tikta)	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Neem ki Chhaal (नीमकी छाल)	Azadirachta indica bark	Juice — 1 Bhavana
Brahmi (ब्राह्मी)	Centella asiatica / Bacopa monnieri	Juice — 1 Bhavana
preparation:
1. Take Bahuvarsheek Mandura (many-years-old Mandura) as the base ingredient.
2. Give 1-1 Bhavana with each of the 14 plant juices/decoctions listed above.
3. Cook the Bhavana-processed Mandura in eight-times Trifala Kwath, reducing to one-sixteenth.
4. When the Kwath dries, powder the Mandura finely.
5. Mix with equal quantity each of Misri (sugar candy), Ghee and Shahad (honey).
6. Add the combined equal-parts powder of additive herbs at one-quarter of the Mandura weight.
7. Mix thoroughly and store in a smooth container (Chikne Paatra).

shloka:
त्रिफला कुण्डली भृङ्गकेशराजाटरूषकम् ।
शतावरी श्रावणी च बलाकूलकपर्पटाः ॥
भार्डी किरातत्तिक्तं च निम्बं मण्डूकपर्णिका ।
कषायैर्भाग्येदासां मण्डूरं बहुवार्षिकम् ।।
त्रिफलायाः रसे पूते पचेदष्टगुणे ततः ।
मण्डूरेण समं दद्यात् सिता सर्पिः सुमाक्षिकम् ।।
त्रिकटु त्रिफला मुस्तं विडङ्गाजाजि चित्रकम् ।
यवानी मधुकं धान्यं चातुर्जातक्रपादिकम् ।
भक्षयेत्तद्यथा कालमम्लपित्तेन पीडितः ।।

name: Kanak Sundar Ras
benefits: Arsha Roga, Kati Shula, Netra Shula, terrible Sannipata Jwara, Kshaya Roga, Kaasa Roga, Shwasa Roga, Mandagni, Jwara Roga, Karna Shula, Shiro Shula, Danta Shula, Peenasa, Pleeha Roga, Hrid Shula, Granthi Vata, Ekanga Vata, Dhanur Vata, Kampa Vata, Murchha, all Vishama Jwara — and many other diseases.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	20 gm
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated  Incinerated Iron Pyrite/Chalcopyrite 	20 gm
Kaanta Loha Bhasma (कान्तलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Magnetic Iron	20 gm
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	 Incinerated Mica 	20 gm
Naga Bhasma (नागभस्म)	 Incinerated Lead	20 gm
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	 Incinerated Gold	20 gm
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	120 gm (equal to all above combined)
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Ginger + Black Pepper + Long Pepper — equal to total processed batch	Equal part
preparation:
1. In a clean stone mortar, firmly Triturate Parada and Gandhaka to make proper Kajjali.
2. Add all Bhasmas and Triturate well. Place in Sharava Samput (sealed earthen saucer), seal with clay and fire in Vidyadhara Yantra using dried cow dung cakes (Daaanyakotpal).
3. When Svanga Sheetal (cooled to body temperature), remove. Triturate in mortar and add equal weight of Trikatu Churna. Triturate for 1 hour.
4. Store in a glass container. This is Kanak Sundar Ras — composed by Acharya Nagabodhi.

shloka:
स्याद्रसं धौतमाक्षीकं कान्ताभ्रं नागहाटकम् । पृथ्वीभटेन सन्तुल्यं सर्वतुल्यं च गन्धकम् ।।४९।।
दत्त्वा विद्याधरे यन्त्रे पुटेदारण्यकोत्पलैः । स्वाङ्गशीतलमुद्धृत्य त्र्यूषणेन विमिश्रयेत् ।।५०।।
अर्शोव्याधौ कटीशूले चक्षुः शूले च दारुणे । सन्निपाते क्षये कासे श्वासे मन्दानले ज्वरे ।। ५१ ।।
कर्णशूले शिरः शूले दन्तशूले प्रयोजयेत् । पीनसे प्लीह्नि हृच्छूले ग्रन्थिवाते च दारुणे ।। ५२ ।।
एकाङ्गे वा धनुर्वाते कम्पवाते च मूच्छिते । ज्वरांश्च विषमान्सर्वान् हन्ति रोगाननेकधा ।।५३।।
सेवितः पथ्ययोगेन रसः कनकसुन्दरः । गुञ्जामात्रं ददीतास्य यथायुक्तानुपानतः ।।५४।।
घृतेन संयुतो वाते मधुना पैत्तिके ज्वरे । पिप्पल्या श्लष्मिके देयः पित्तोद्भूते सचन्दनः ।।५५।।
तक्रेण श्लेष्मवातोत्थे वातपित्ते घृतान्वितः । श्लैष्मपित्ते चार्द्रकेण निर्गुण्ड्या सान्निपातिके ।।१:६।।
फलत्रयेण शूलेषु विषमेषु ज्वरेष्वपि । आर्द्रकेणाथ वा दद्याद्वह्निमान्द्ये विशेषतः ।।५७।।
अभिष्यन्दे शिरः शूले गायत्रीबोलसंयुतम् । पक्षिमांससमायुक्तं कफवाते च मूच्छिते ।।५८।।
एकाङ्गे च धनुर्वाते क्षीरयुक्तं च पीनसे । पाण्डुरोगे क्षये कासे मरिचाज्यैश्च कामले ।।५९।।
बोलेनाऽर्द्धकटीशूले भाषितं नागबोधिना ।।६०।।

name: Tikshanamukha Ras
benefits: Arsha Roga (Hemorrhoids/Piles)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	 Incinerated Gold	Equal part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	 Incinerated Copper	Equal part
Vidala Vana Churna (विडललवणचूर्ण)	Vida Salt powder	Equal part
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	Equal part
Shu. Manaahshila (शु. मन:शिला)	Purified Realgar (Arsenic disulphide)	Equal part
Tiksna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	Equal part
Shu. Mandura Churna (शु. मण्डूरचूर्ण)	Purified Iron Rust powder	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	 Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka Churna (शु. गन्धकचूर्ण)	Purified Sulphur powder	Equal part
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	 Incinerated Iron Pyrite/Chalcopyrite 	Equal part
preparation:
1. In a stone mortar, firmly Triturate Parada and Gandhaka to make proper Kajjali.
2. Add all other ingredients in equal parts and Triturate thoroughly.
3. Give one Bhavana with Ghritkumari Svaras (Aloe vera juice).
4. Form one large ball, dry well. Place in Sharava Samput, seal with clay and fire in Kukkutaputa (hen-egg sized firing).
5. When Svanga Sheetal (cooled), remove, Triturate in mortar and store in glass.
6. This is called Tikshanamukha Ras. Use at 125-250 mg with appropriate Anupana for Arsha Roga (hemorrhoids).
shloka: रसेन्द्रहेमार्कविडाऽऽलगोला सुरायसं लोहमलाभ्रगन्धाः । ताप्यं च कन्यारसमर्दितोऽयं पक्वः पुटे तीक्ष्णमुखोऽर्शसां स्यात् ।। ६३ ।।

name: Arshoghni Vati
benefits: Arsha-Bhagandara (Hemorrhoids and Fistula-in-ano)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	100 gm
Rajata Bhasma (रजतभस्म)	 Incinerated Silver 	100 gm
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	 Incinerated Copper	100 gm
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	 Incinerated Mica 	100 gm
Tiksna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	 Incinerated Iron 	20 gm
Shu. Vatsanabhi Vishachu. (शु. वत्सनाभिविषचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	6 gm
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	200 gm
Bhavana Dravya (Processing Substances)
- Trifala Kwath — Trifala decoction — 3 Bhavanas
- Dashamula Kwath — Ten-root decoction — cook 1 day
- Shatavari Kwath — Asparagus racemosus decoction — cook 1 day
preparation:
1. In a clean stone mortar, firmly Triturate Parada and Gandhaka to make proper Kajjali.
2. Add all Bhasmas and Shu. Vatsanabhi Vishachu. Mix well.
3. Give 1 Bhavana with Jambiri Svaras (lemon juice).
4. Give 3 Bhavanas with Trifala Kwath.
5. Place in a clay vessel (Mrinmaya Bhajan). Cook progressively: one day with Dashamula Kwath, then one day with Shatavari Kwath.
6. When dried, form tablets of 375 mg each. Dry in shade thoroughly and store in glass.
7. Consumption of this medicine   treats significantlys Arsha-Bhagandara (hemorrhoids and fistula) and their associated Shula (pain).
shloka:
गन्धकं तारताघ्रं च कृत्वा चैकत्र पिष्टिकाम् । तत्समं चाभ्रकं तीक्ष्णं गन्धकात्पञ्चमांशकम् ।। २३ ।।
विषं च षोडशांशेन द्वौ भागौ सूतकस्य च । एकीकृत्य प्रयत्नेन जम्बीरद्रवमर्दितम् ।। २४ ।।
भाजने मृण्मये स्थाप्य वराक्वाथेन भावयेत् । दशमूलशतावर्योः क्वाथे पाच्यः क्रमेण हि ।। २५ ।।
अथोत्तार्य प्रयत्नेन वटिकां कारयेद् बुधः । गुञ्जात्रयप्रमाणेन हन्ति शूलं गुदाङ्करम् ।। २६ ।।

name: Mulkuthar Ras
benefits: Treats significantlys: Arsha (hemorrhoids), all Naasa disorders (nasal), Akshi Roga (eye disorders), Guda Roga (rectal disorders), all severe painful conditions, Pleeha Roga (spleen), Grahani (malabsorption), Gulma (abdominal tumors), Mandya (debility) and Kushtha (skin diseases).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Varnaga (वरनाग)	Alloy of Tiksna Loha (sharp iron) + Neelanjana (lead sulphide)	20 gm
Abhraka Sattva (अभ्रकसत्व)	Mica extract/purified mica powder	20 gm
Shu. Tamra (शु. ताम्र)	Purified Copper	20 gm
Tiksna Loha (तीक्ष्णलोह)	Incinerated Iron	20 gm
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	240 gm (3x the metals)
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	80 gm
preparation:
This is an extremely complex preparation involving multiple stages:
Stage 1: Melt Varnaga, Abhraka Sattva, Tamra and Tiksna Loha together. Add 3x Shu. Haritala gradually with iron ladle while Triturateing. Continue until 240 gm Haritala has been incorporated.
Stage 2: Add equal weight Shu. Parada and make Pisthi (paste). Form ball, bury at the base of a Bhallata (marking nut) tree. After 1 month: retrieve and give Bhavana with cow's milk.
Stage 3: Extract Bhallatakatailam (marking nut oil) by Patalyantra (1.500 kg oil from 10 kg fruit). Give Bhavana to 4 Ki. Shu. Gandhaka with 1 kg Bhallatakatailam. Dry separately.
Stage 4: Gradually add Bhavana-processed Gandhaka to the metals, fire in Gajaputa repeatedly until all metals become Bhasma. Set aside.
Stage 5: Make Kajjali from the final Bhasma with Shu. Parada. Add Vana Surana, Nirgundi, Maharashtri and other herb juices — triturate. Give 3x Bhavana with Maarkava (Eclipta alba) juice.
Stage 6: Powder and store in wooden vessel.
shloka:
वरनागं तथा व्योमसत्त्वं शुल्वं च तीक्ष्णकम् । सर्वमेकत्र विद्राव्य क्षिप्त्वाऽऽलं चाल्पमल्पकम् ।। ३१ ।।
चालयेदनिशं यावत्तालकं त्रिगुणं खलु । ततस्तेन विमर्द्याथ पिष्टीं कुर्याद्रसेन हि ।।३२।।
ततो भल्लातकीवृक्षमूलान्तस्थां खनेच्च ताम् । मासादाकृष्य तां पिष्टीं गव्यदुग्धे विनिक्षिपेत् ।। ३३ ।।
ततो भल्लातकीतैलं हृतं पातालयन्त्रतः । आयसे भाजने स्निग्धे पिष्टिकां तां निवेश्य च ।। ३४ ।।
प्रस्थमात्रं हि तत्तैलं जारयेदतियत्नतः । तत्तैलभावितैर्गन्धैः पुटित्वा भस्मतां व्रजेत् ।।३५।।
ततः कार्त्तिकमासोत्थकोरण्टदलजै रसैः । रसं सम्मर्द्य सम्मर्द्य धर्मे संस्थाप्य मारयेत् ।। ३६ ।।
तद्भस्म मेलयेत्पूर्वभस्मना समभागिकम् । वनशूरणनिर्गुण्डी महाराष्ट्रीभकण्टिका ।।३७।।
वज्रवल्ली शिखी चैषां रसैः पिष्ट्वा विशोषयेत् । त्रिवारं मार्कवद्रावैर्द्रावयित्वा विशोषयेत् ।। ३८ ।।
चूर्णीकृत्य प्रयत्नेन क्षिपेत्काचकरण्डके ।
सोऽयं मूलकुठारको रसवरो दीप्याग्निवेल्लोत्तमासंयुक्तः स घृतश्च वल्लतुलितः संसेवितो नाशयेत् ।
अर्शास्यानननासिकाक्षिगुदजान्यत्युग्रपीडानि च प्लीहानं ग्रहणीं च गुल्मयकृतौ मान्द्यं च कुष्ठामयान् ।। ३९ ।।
“तीक्ष्णनीलाञ्जनोपेतं ध्मातं हि बहुशो दृढम् । मृदु कृष्णं द्रुतद्रावं वरनागं तदुच्यते ।।' (र.र.समु.८/४१)

name: Pitta Arsha Har Ras
benefits: Treats significantlys Pitta Arsha (Pitta-type hemorrhoids/bleeding piles).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasa Sindura / Mruta Soota (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	 Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Svarna Bhasma (सुवर्णभस्म)	 Incinerated Gold	Equal part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	 Incinerated Copper	Equal part
Tiksna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	 Incinerated Iron 	Equal part
Munda Loha Bhasma (मुण्डलोहभस्म)	Munda type Incinerated Iron 	Equal part
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
Shu. Mandura (शु. मण्डूर)	Purified Iron Rust ash	Equal part
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Chalcopyrite/Iron Pyrite ash	Equal part
Ghritkumari Svaras (घृतकुमारी स्वरस)	Aloe vera juice — for Bhavana and tablet formation	As required
preparation:
1. In a clean large mortar, Triturate Rasa Sindura first. Add all other fine powdered Bhasmas and Gandhaka. Mix well.
2. Give Bhavana with Ghritkumari Svaras (Aloe vera juice) and Triturate for one full day.
3. Place the dried powder in an Andha Musha (sealed/blind crucible — seal the opening).
4. Cook on Tusha Vahni (rice husk fire) for three consecutive days. Add fresh Dhan Bhoosi (rice husk) each day for continuous heat.
5. On the fourth day, when Svanga Sheetal (completely cooled), remove the medicine.
6. Give one Bhavana with Ghritkumari Svaras.
7. Form tablets of 250 mg each. Dry completely in shade and store in glass container.
shloka:
मृतसूता भ्रहेमार्कतीक्ष्णमुण्डं सगन्धकम् । मण्डूरं माक्षिकं तुल्यं मईं कन्याद्रवैर्दिनम् ।। ६४ ।।
अन्धमूषागतं पाच्यं त्रिदिनं तुषवह्निना । चूर्णितं सितया माषं खादेत्पित्तार्शसां जयेत् ।। ६५ ।।

name: Arsha Kuthar Ras - 1
benefits: Arsha Roga (Hemorrhoids/Piles)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	46 gm (1 Pala)
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	93 gm (2 Pala)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	140 gm (3 Pala)
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	140 gm (3 Pala)
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Ginger + Black Pepper + Long Pepper powder	93 gm (2 Pala)
Shu. Kilihari Churna (शु. किलिहारीचूर्ण)	Purified Gloriosa superba powder	93 gm (2 Pala)
Dantimool Churna (दन्तीमूलचूर्ण)	Baliospermum montanum root powder	93 gm (2 Pala)
Piluka Kashtha Churna (पीलूकाष्ठचूर्ण)	Careya arborea wood powder	93 gm (2 Pala)
Chitraka Mool Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	93 gm (2 Pala)
Yavakshara (यवक्षार)	Barley alkali	235 gm (5 Pala)
Shu. Tankana Churna (शु. टङ्कणचूर्ण)	Purified Borax powder	235 gm (5 Pala)
Saindhava Lavana (सैन्धवलवण)	Rock Salt	235 gm (5 Pala)
preparation:
1. In a clean stone mortar, firmly perform Mardana procedure Parada and Gandhaka to make proper Kajjali.
2. Add all Bhasmas and fine powders of all herbs to the Kajjali and perform Mardana procedure together for 1 hour.
3. In a clay pot (Mritpatra), combine Gau Mutra (cow's urine) and Snuhi Ksheera (Euphorbia milk sap) with the above powder mixture.
4. Subjected to heat on low fire (Mandagni), stirring continuously with a large spoon. Continue subjected to heating until it becomes a well-condensed paste (Supindita).
5. When dry and condensed, form tablets of 125 mg (1-1 Ratti). Dry in shade and store in glass.
6. This is called Arsha Kuthar Ras.
anupana: Takra (buttermilk), Dadima Phala Ras (pomegranate juice) or Pakka Surana Kanda Ras (subjected to heated elephant foot yam)
shloka:
शुद्धसूतं पलैकं तु द्विपलं शुद्धगन्धकम् । मृतं ताम्रं मृतं लोहं प्रत्येकं तु पलत्रयम् ।।५।।
त्र्यूषणं लाङ्गली दन्ती पिलुकं चित्रकं तथा । प्रत्येकं द्विपलं योज्यं यवक्षारं च टङ्कणम् ।।६।।
उभौ पञ्चपलौ योज्यौ सैन्धवं पलपञ्चकम् । द्वात्रिंशत्पलगोमूत्रं स्नुहीक्षीरं च तत्समम् ।।७।।
मृद्वग्निना पचेत्स्थाल्यां सर्वं यावत्सुपिण्डितम् । माषद्वयं सदा खादेद्रसो ह्यर्शः कुठारकः ।।
तक्रेण दाडिमाम्भोभिः पक्वकन्देन वाऽथ तत् ।।८।।

name: Mahodaya Pratyaya Sar Ras
benefits: Treats significantlys with appropriate Anupana: all Gudaja Roga (Arsha-Bhagandara), Yakshma (tuberculosis), Kushtha (skin diseases), Mandagni (weak digestion), Shula (colic), Adhm|ana (bloating), Kapha Roga, Shwasa (asthma), Unmada (psychosis), Apasmara (epilepsy), all Vata disorders, Mahajwara, all Vata-Kapha diseases and Dushta Grahani (severe malabsorption).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur (Rasagrasta/settled)	140 gm (3 Pala)
Rasa Sindura / Mruta Soota (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	12 gm (1 Karsha)
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated mica	12 gm (1 Karsha)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated copper	12 gm (1 Karsha)
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	12 gm (1 Karsha)
Shu. Hingu (शु. हिङ्गुल)	Purified Asafoetida	46 gm (1 Pala)
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Chalcopyrite/Iron Pyrite 	140 gm (3 Pala)
Shu. Kimpillaka Churna (शु. कम्पिल्लकचूर्ण)	Purified Mallotus philippensis powder	46 gm (1 Pala)
Shu. Vatsanabhi Vishachu. (शु. वत्सनाभिविषचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	23 gm (half Pala)
Guda (गुड)	Jaggery — for coating the ball	140 gm
Shu. Manaahshila Churna (शु. मन:शिलाचूर्ण)	Purified Realgar powder — for coating	140 gm
Shu. Gandhak (extra, for Musha)	Extra purified sulphur — for Gajaputa bed	140 gm
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment — on top in Musha	140 gm
Bhavana: Vishatinduka Phala Kwath	Strychnos nux-vomica fruit decoction — 7 Bhavanas	As required
preparation:
1. In a clean stone mortar,perform Mardana procedure Rasa Sindura and add Gandhaka,perform Mardana procedurefor 1 hour.
2. Add all Bhasmas and powders (from Abhraka Bhasma to Vatsanabhi Vishachu.) andperform Mardana procedure with Churnodaka (lime water) for 7 days.
3. Form one large ball. Dry in sunlight for 7 days.
4. Make equal-parts paste of Shu. Manaahshila and Guda (jaggery). Apply 1-finger thick coating on the ball. Dry.
5. In a large Musha, spread 140 gm Shu. Gandhaka. Place the coated ball on it. Add 140 gm Shu. Haritala on top of ball. Seal firmly and fire in Gajaputa.
6. When Svanga Sheetal: remove,perform Mardana procedure. Give 7 Bhavanas with Vishatinduka (Strychnos nux-vomica) fruit juice. Dry in shade, then sunlight.
7. Weigh total medicine and add Vaikanta Bhasma at 1/30th of the weight. Mix thoroughly and store in glass.
8. This is Mahodaya Pratyaya Sar Ras — composed by Acharya Nandi.
shloka:
रसग्रस्तसमुद्गीर्णगन्धकस्य पलत्रयम् । मृतसूताभ्रताम्रायः कर्षं कर्ष पृथक् पृथक् ।।४०।।
पलं हिङ्गुलचूर्णस्य माक्षिकस्य पलत्रयम् । पलं कम्पिल्लकस्यापि विषस्यार्द्धपलं तथा ।।४१।।
सप्ताहं मर्दयेत्सर्वं दत्त्वा चूर्णोदकं मुहुः । ततस्तद्गोलकं कृत्वा सप्ताहं चातपे क्षिपेत् ।।४२।।
गुडचूर्ण शिलाचूर्ण लिम्पेदङ्गुलिकाघनम् । त्रिपलं गन्धकं दत्त्वा क्रौञ्चयामथ च गोलकम् ।।४३।।
गोलकस्योपरिष्टाच्च क्षिपेत्तालपलत्रयम् । संरुध्याऽतिप्रयत्नेन दद्याद्गजपुटं खलु ।।४४।।
स्वाङ्गशीतलमागत्य गोलकं लेपनैः सह । विचूर्ण्य सप्तवारं हि विषतिन्दुफलोद्भवैः ।।४५।।
द्रवैरथाऽऽतपे शुष्कं क्षिपेद्रम्ये करण्डके । त्रिंशदंशेन वैक्रान्तभस्म तस्मिन्विनिक्षिपेत् ।।४६ ।।
अयं हि नन्दीश्वरसम्प्रदिष्टो रसो विशिष्टः खलु रोगहन्ता । निःशेषरोगेष्वहतप्रतापो महोदयप्रत्ययसारनामा ।।४७।।
हन्यात्सर्वगुदामयान्क्षयगदं कुष्ठं मन्दाग्नितां शूलाध्मानगदं कर्फ श्वसनतामुन्मादकापस्मृती ।
सर्वा वातरुजो महाज्वरगदान्नानाप्रकारांस्तथा वातश्लेष्मभवं महामयचयं दुष्टग्रहण्यामयम् ।।४८।।

name: Tikshanamukha Ras
benefits: Arsha Roga (Hemorrhoids/Piles)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	Equal part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated copper	Equal part
Vidala Vana Churna (विडललवणचूर्ण)	Vida Salt powder	Equal part
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	Equal part
Shu. Manaahshila (शु. मन:शिला)	Purified Realgar (Arsenic disulphide)	Equal part
Tiksna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	Sharp Incinerated Iron	Equal part
Shu. Mandura Churna (शु. मण्डूरचूर्ण)	Purified Iron Rust powder	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated mica	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka Churna (शु. गन्धकचूर्ण)	Purified Sulphur powder	Equal part
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Iron Pyrite/Chalcopyrite 	Equal part
preparation: 1. Firmly perform Mardana procedure Parada and Gandhaka to make Kajjali. Add all other ingredients in equal parts andperform Mardana procedure.\n2. Give one Bhavana with Ghritkumari Svaras (Aloe vera juice). Form one large ball and dry well.\n3. Place in Sharava Samput, seal with clay and fire in Kukkutaputa. When cooled,perform Mardana procedure and store in glass.
shloka: रसेन्द्रहेमार्कविडाऽऽलगोला सुरायसं लोहमलाभ्रगन्धाः । ताप्यं च कन्यारसमर्दितोऽयं पक्वः पुटे तीक्ष्णमुखोऽर्शसां स्यात् ।।६३।।

name: Lohashtak Modak
benefits: Arsha Roga (hemorrhoids/piles).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	1 part
Indrayava Churna (इन्द्रयवचूर्ण)	Holarrhena antidysenterica (kurchi seed) powder	1 part
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण)	Dry Ginger powder	1 part
Shu. Bhallata (शु. भल्लातक)	Purified Semecarpus anacardium (marking nut)	1 part
Chitraka Mool Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	1 part
Bilva Phala Majja Churna (बिल्वफलमज्जाचूर्ण)	Aegle marmelos (bael) fruit pulp powder	1 part
Vidanga Churna (विडङ्गचूर्ण)	Embelia ribes powder	1 part
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	1 part
Guda (गुड)	Jaggery — equal to all eight combined	8 parts (equal to total)
preparation:
1. Combine all eight powders and sieve through a fine cloth to make uniform powder.
2. Dissolve Guda (jaggery) in water and strain through cloth.
3. Subjected to heat the Guda solution on low fire (Mridu Agni).
4. When Gudapaka (jaggery syrup) reaches the right consistency (Chasni — thread-forming stage), add the combined powder and mix well.
5. Form Vataka (balls/Modak) of 12-12 gm each (1 Karsha). Store in glass.
6. Take 1-1 Modak morning and evening with water — Arsha Roga becomes pacified.
shloka:
मृतं लोहं चेन्द्रयवं शुण्ठी भल्लातचित्रकम् । बिल्वमज्जाविडङ्गानि पथ्या तुल्यं विचूर्णयेत् ।।
सर्वतुल्यं गुडं योज्यं कर्ष भुक्त्वाऽर्शसां जयेत् ।। २७ ।।

name: Sarvalokashraya Ras
benefits: Treats significantlys: Vata-Kapha diseases, all Gudaja Roga (Arsha-Bhagandara), Shotha (swelling), Pandu (anaemia), Rajayakshma (tuberculosis), Shosha (wasting), Vata Shula (colic), Jwara (fever), Agnimandya (weak digestion), Gulma (abdominal tumor) and all accumulated diseases. It is an immediately acting Deepan (digestive fire stimulant).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	46 gm (1 Pala)
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	23 gm (half Pala)
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	23 gm
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Chalcopyrite/Iron Pyrite 	23 gm
Shu. Vatsanabhi Vishachu. (शु. वत्सनाभिविषचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	12 gm
Yashad Bhasma / Rasaka (यशदभस्म)	Incinerated Zinc Sulphide 	12 gm
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated copper — added after Kupipakwa	46 gm (2 Pala)
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated mica — added after Kupipakwa	46 gm (2 Pala)
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (extra, added after)	Purified Aconitum ferox — added after	23 gm
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder — added after	183 gm (4 Pala)
preparation:
1. In a clean stone mortar, firmly perform Mardana procedure Parada, Gandhaka and Haritala together to make Kajjali. Add Svarna Makshika Bhasma, Vatsanabhi Vishachu. and Rasaka (Yashad Bhasma).perform Mardana procedure with Nimbu Svaras for 3 days.
2. Form a small ball, dry. Place in glass bottle (Kupipakwa bottle), seal mouth with copper sheet and 1.5-finger thick clay. Place in sand-filled vessel to 1/3 level, fill sand up to bottle neck.
3. Apply fire below for half a day (36 hours) on low-medium-high progressive heat. When Svanga Sheetal, break the glass vessel and remove medicine.perform Mardana procedure well.
4. Add Tamra Bhasma and Abhraka Bhasma 46-46 gm, Shu. Vatsanabha Churna 23 gm and Maricha Churna 183 gm.perform Mardana procedure all together for 1 hour and store in glass (originally stored in coconut shell vessel).
5. This is Sarvalokashraya Ras. Use at 2 Ratti (250 mg) dose with Gau Ghrita (cow's ghee).
shloka:
शुद्धं सूतं पलं गन्धं गन्धार्द्ध तालताप्यकम् । अमृतं रसकं चैव तालकार्द्धविभागिकम् ।। १० ।।
एतेषां कज्जलीं कुर्याददृढं सम्मर्घ वासरम् । त्रिदिनं मर्दयेच्चाथ दत्त्वा निम्बुजलं खलु ।।११।।
वटीकृत्य विशोष्याथ काचकूप्यां निधापयेत् । निष्कतुल्याऽर्कपत्रेण पिधायास्यं प्रयत्नतः ।।१२।।
सार्धाङ्गुलमितोत्सेधं मृत्स्नया तां विलेप्य च । ततो भाण्डतृतीयांशे सिकतापरिपूरिते ।।१३।।
निधाय सिकतामूर्नि सिकताभिः प्रपूरयेत् । रुद्ध्वाऽऽस्यं तदधो वहिं ज्वालयेत्सार्द्धवासरम् ।।१४।।
स्वाङ्गशीतलितं काचघटादाकृष्य तं रसम् । पटचूर्णं विधायाथ ताम्रमभ्रं पलद्वयम् ।।१५।।
पलार्द्धममृतं चैव मरिचं च चतुष्पलम् । एकीकृत्य क्षिपेत्

name: Atisararnav Ras
benefits: Atisararnav Ras treats significantlys Sarva Atisara (all types of diarrhoea and dysentery).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Darada / Shingraf (शु. दरद/शिंगरफ)	Purified Cinnabar (Mercuric Sulphide)	Equal part
Krita Karpura (कृतकर्पूर)	Processed/sublimed Camphor	Equal part
Mushta / Nagara Motha (मुस्ता/नागरमोथा)	Cyperus rotundus (nut grass) powder	Equal part
Indrayava (इन्द्रयव)	Holarrhena antidysenterica (kurchi) seeds	Equal part
preparation:
1. Take equal parts of Shu. Darada (Shingraf/Cinnabar), Krita Karpura, Mushta and Indrayava.
2. Combine all and give Bhavana with Khakhasi Kshar (Afeem/Opium) juice.
3. After Bhavana,perform Mardana procedure with Jala (water) and form small tablets (Goli).
4. Dry in shade and store in glass.

name: Ananda Bhairav Ras
benefits: Atisara (Diarrhoea/Dysentery)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Hingula (शु. हिङ्गुल)	Purified Cinnabar (Mercuric Sulphide)	Equal part
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	Equal part
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	Equal part
Shu. Tankana (शु. टङ्कण)	Purified Borax	Equal part
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder	Equal part
preparation: 1. In a clean mortar, combine all five ingredients in equal parts.\n2. Give Bhavana with Jala (water) and perform Mardana procedure together thoroughly.\n3. Form tablets of 1-1 Ratti (125 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in glass.
anupana: Madhu (Honey) with Kutajat Tvak Churna and Indrayava Churna

name: Atisarantako Ras
benefits: Treats significantly even the most severe (Atiprabal) Atisara — the strongest and most rushing diarrhoea/dysentery. It stops both the Atisara (diarrhoea) and Pravaha (tenesmus/straining with discharge).
ingredients: Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity\nSvarna Sindura (स्वर्णसिन्दूर)	Gold Sindura — processed 6 times with Bali Jarit method	1 part\nSvarna Papdi (स्वर्णपर्पटी)	Gold crust/flake — made from Rasa Karpura with half-part gold	1 part
preparation: 1. Prepare Svarna Sindura (Shadguna Balijaarit — fired six times): this is a specific gold-mercury compound made by firing gold and mercury together six times with special processing.\n2. Prepare Svarna Papdi: take Rasa Karpura (sublimed mercury chloride/Calomel), add half part of Svarna (gold), process to make flat gold crust (Papdi).\n3.perform Mardana procedure Svarna Sindura (1 part) and Svarna Papdi (1 part) together. Mix thoroughly and store.
reference: Bharat Bhaishajya Ratnakar, part-1,verse 285, page no 101

name: Chintamani Ras
benefits: Chintamani Ras is indicated in: Atisara (all types of diarrhoea/dysentery), Tridoshaja conditions, Sangraha (dysentery with constipative tendency) and other major diseases.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Shu. Vatsanabha Vishachu. (शु. वत्सनाभिविषचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	Half Karsha (6 gm)
Tintandi Phala / Imli (तिन्तन्डीफल/इमली)	Tamarind fruit	Quarter Karsha (3 gm)
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder — added after firing	Half Karsha (6 gm)
Tintandi Churna (तिन्तन्डीचूर्ण)	Tamarind powder — added after firing	Half Karsha (6 gm)
Sita / Misri (सिता/मिश्री)	Sugar/Rock candy — for tablet formation	As required
preparation:
1. Make Kajjali from Parada and Gandhaka. Add Tamra Bhasma and perform Mardana procedure. Add Shu. Vatsanabha Vishachu. and Tintandi Phala (Imli/tamarind).perform Mardana procedure all with Amla Drava (sour liquid/Kanji) until fully combined and stiff.
2. Form a smooth round ball of six-finger width. Place Nagavallya (betel) leaves in a clay vessel, place ball on leaves, cover with more betel leaves, seal the vessel with clay and fire in Gajaputa.
3. When Svanga Sheetal: remove,perform Mardana procedure. Add half Karsha Maricha Churna (black pepper) and half Karsha Tintandi Churna (tamarind powder).perform Mardana procedure with water.
4. Form Gunja-size tablets (approximately 125 mg) with Sita (sugar). Dry in shade and store in glass. This great medicine is Chintamani Ras.

name: Lokanath Ras
benefits: Treats significantlys Sarva Atisara (all types of diarrhoea and dysentery).
ingredients: Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity\nRasa Sindura / Bhasma Soota (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	1 part\nShu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	4 parts
preparation:
1. Take Rasa Sindura (1 part) and Shu. Gandhaka (4 parts).perform Mardana procedure together.
2. Fill this mixture inside Varatika (cowrie shells).
3. Mix Tankana (borax) with Bakri Dugdha (goat's milk) to make a paste. Use this paste to seal the mouths of the cowrie shells firmly. Dry well.
4. Place the sealed cowrie shells in a clay vessel (Haandi). Seal the vessel opening with clay and fire in Gajaputa.
5. When Svanga Sheetal (completely cooled), remove the shells. Open and extract the medicine. Store in glass.
6. This is Lokanatha Ras.

name: Sudhasara Ras
benefits: Sudhasara Ras is Deepana, Pachana, Grahi, Hridya and Ruchikara. It immediately stops: Doshtraya Atisara , Ama Atisara (mucus diarrhoea), Raktatisara (blood dysentery), Jwara Atisara (fever with diarrhoea) and Visuchika (acute cholera-like illness with vomiting and purging),this medicine treats significantlys all abdominal diseases immediately.
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Gandhak (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	46 gm
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	46 gm
Nishchandra Abhraka Bhasma (निश्चन्द्र अभ्रकभस्म)	Fully processed Incinerated Mica(no mica sheen)	46 gm
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण)	Dry Ginger powder	93 gm
Duralabha Churna (दुरालभचूर्ण)	Fagonia arabica powder	93 gm
Mushta Churna (मुस्ताचूर्ण)	Cyperus rotundus powder	12 gm
Kutaja Tvak Churna (कुटजत्वक्चूर्ण)	Holarrhena antidysenterica bark powder	12 gm
Ajwain Churna (अजवाइनचूर्ण)	Trachyspermum ammi powder	12 gm
Chitraka Mool Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	12 gm
Mochras Churna (मोचरसचूर्ण)	Salmalia malabarica (red silk cotton) resin powder	12 gm
Jeeraka Churna (जीरकचूर्ण)	Cuminum cyminum (cumin) powder	12 gm
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	12 gm
- Kachchi Tinduka Phala Ras/Kwath — raw Diospyros embryopteris fruit juice or decoction
- Shunthi Kwath — dry ginger decoction — 7 Bhavanas
preparation:
1. Make Kajjali from Parada and Gandhaka. Add Nishchandra Abhraka Bhasma. Stir with wooden stick in Kutaja bark vessel.
2. Give 1-1 Bhavana with each of the 8 processing substances (Kachchi Tinduka, Gular Mool Dudh, Aralu Tvak Ras, Dughinee Svaras, Putapakva Anar Ras, Krishna Kambojika Mool Ras, Kutaja Valk Ras).
3. Add all Churna powders (Shunthi, Duralabha, Mushta, Kutaja Tvak, Ajwain, Chitraka Mool, Mochras, Jeeraka, Vatsanabha). Mix into Kajjali.
4. Give 7 Bhavanas with Shunthi Kwath (dry ginger decoction), then 7 Bhavanas with Ardraka Svaras (fresh ginger juice).
5. Dry thoroughly and store in wooden vessel. This is Sudhasara Ras — amrit-like medicine.

name: Atisarharo Ras
