Anupana Ingredients
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
preparation: 1. Perform Mardana procedure all 7 equal-part ingredients together with Nara Mootra (human urine) until a uniform mass is formed. Roll into balls.\n2. Add double quantity of Shu. Gandhaka to the ball. Cook briefly in an iron vessel (Loha Patra) for a short time.\n3. Remove, powder finely and store in glass vessel. This is Bhoot Bhairav Rasa.

name: Indrabrahma Vati
benefits: Apasmara (Epilepsy)
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity

Chandi Bhasma (चाँदीभस्म)	Incinerated Silver 	Equal part
Svarna Maakshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Iron pyrite / Chalcopyrite ash	Equal part

preparation: 1. Perform Mardana procedure all equal-part Bhasmas and ingredients together for 1 full day.\n2. Give 7 sequential Bhavanas — one day each — with: Snuhi, Vijaya, Eranda, Vacha, Nishpaava, Surana and Nirgundi juices.\n3. Cook the resulting mass in Kakuni-Sarshapa Taila (black mustard oil) with Gandhaka added. When fully cooked, remove, perform Mardana procedure in mortar and form pills of Chana-matra (chickpea size). Store in glass vessel. This is Indrabrahma Vati.

name: Navanga Vatika
benefits: Apasmara (Epilepsy)
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Svarna Bhasma (सुवर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold  	Equal part
Rajata Bhasma (रजतभस्म)	Incinerated Silver 	Equal part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper    	Equal part
Naga Bhasma (नागभस्म)	Incinerated Lead  (Pishta = Naga / Trilohipishta)	Equal part
Srotanjana (स्रोतोञ्जन)	Srotanjana (a natural collyrium/mineral)	Equal part
Shu. Mana:shila (शु. मन:शिला)	Purified Realgar (Arsenic disulphide)	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
Rasasindura (रससिन्दूर)	Purified Mercuric Sulphide	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Classical Commentary (Tika)
Pishta = Naga (lead). Srishtiraya = the trio: Abhraka Bhasma + Shu. Mana:shila + Shu. Gandhaka. Srishti = Vriddhi (power/potency). Traya = also interpreted as Bakuchi Churna (Psoralea corylifolia seed powder). These classical commentaries clarify the compound ingredient names in the original shloka.
preparation: 1. Take all 9 ingredients in equal parts. Perform Mardana procedure together in a clean mortar.\n2. Form pills of 1 Ratti (125 mg) each. Dry in shade. Store in glass vessel. This is Navanga Vatika.

name: Sutak Pratyaya
benefits: Apasmara (Epilepsy), Unmada (Insanity)
ingredients: Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity\nPurvokt Parpati Ras (पूर्वोक्त पर्पटीरस)	Parpati Ras (as described in Chapter 22)	1 part\nRasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	1 part
preparation: 21.	Take Parpati Ras and Rasa Sindura in equal (1:1) parts. Triturate both together in a mortar.\n22.	Give Bhavana with Brahmi Svaras (Bacopa monnieri juice). Form tablets of 125 mg (1 Ratti) each.\n23.	Dry in shade and store in glass vessel. This is Sutak Pratyaya.

name: Unmadgajankush Ras
benefits: Tridosha Unmada (insanity), especially Bhutonnmada (supernatural psychiatric disorder)
ingredients:

preparation:
24.	Take Shu. Parada. Give 1-day Bhavana each in: Dhattura Ras, Brahmadandi Ras and Kuchela Ras (sequentially, 1 day each).
26.	Add equal weight of Shu. Gandhaka to the processed Parada. Prepare Kajjali in a clean mortar.
27.	Place the Kajjali in a Tamra Samputa (copper sealed vessel). Fire with Laghu Puta. When cooled (Svaangasheetal), remove.
28.	Add Shu. Dhattura Beej, Abhraka Bhasma and Shu. Vatsanabha Visha — all equal parts to the post-Puta medicine. Triturate for 3 days. Form tablets of 1 Ratti (125 mg) each. This is Unmadgajankush Ras.

name: Chandbhairav Ras
benefits: Unmada Roga
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity

29.	In a clean mortar, first perform Mardana procedure Rasa Sindura finely. Add Svarna Bhasma and triturate well together.

31.	Cook with Shu. Gandhaka Taila at Mridagni (low/mild fire) for 1.5 hours.
32.	Form tablets of 1 Ratti (125 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Chandbhairav Ras.

name: Chaturbhuj Ras

Remove after 3 days and powder finely. This is Chaturbhuj Ras.\n36.	Administer in dose according to Agni Bala (digestive strength) with Trifala churna and honey.

name: Sarveshwar Ras
benefits: Unmada (Insanity), Apasmara (Epilepsy)
ingredients: Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity\nAmlavetas Kwath (अम्लवेतसकाथ)	Garcinia pedunculata decoction — 5-day Bhavana	As required\nChitrakmool Kwath (चित्रकनिष्काथ)	Plumbago zeylanica root decoction — 21-day Bhavana	As required
preparation:
37.	Prepare coarse powder of 8 Kwath herbs (Narangi Mool to Bibhitaka). Boil in 4x water. Strain through cloth to get decoction.
38.	Perform Mardana procedure Rasa Sindura and Mrigashring Bhasma finely in mortar. Add the Kwath decoction and triturate for 3 days.

name: Sarva Vatari Ras
benefits: Sarva Vatari Ras treats significantlys: 80 types of Vata Roga, 8 types of Gulma, 4 types of Mandagni, Udara Shool (abdominal colic), Krimi (intestinal worms), Adhmana (bloating/flatulence), Hikka (hiccough), Moodhavata (obstructed Vata) and Vibandha (constipation).

45.	Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka. Add Haritala and Manashila successively. Add Shu. Rakta Vatsanabha. Triturate for 7 days total.

Vimarsha (Commentary)
Currently, making 375 mg tablets is more practical. Take 2 tablets (750 mg) together with Goghrita (ghee).

name: Sut Tail / Soota Taila
benefits: Mahavata diseases â€” Baahu/Shira/Jangha Kampa, Ekanga Vata, all Vata Roga
ingredients:
Ingredients (Equal Parts)

preparation:
51.	Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka. Add Shu. Haritala and Shu. Manashila and triturate. Give Kanji Bhavana for 2–3 hours.
52.	Apply this Kajjali paste as a uniform coat on a thin fine cloth (approx. 14 × 14 cm). Oil the coated cloth and roll into a Varti (wick). Wrap with thread. Dry in sun for 1 day.
53.	Next day, submerge the wick in a vessel full of Tila Taila (sesame oil) and leave overnight.
54.	Next day, hold one end with tongs. Light the other end. Place a collecting vessel below. The burning wick drips oil — collect all the dripping oil. When wick fully burns, filter oil through cloth into glass. This is Soot Taila.

name: Tryambakeshvara Rasa
benefits: Ardhangavata (Hemiplegia); Kampavata (Tremor / Parkinson's disease)
ingredients: Ingredient\n(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity\nTrikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Shunthee + Maricha + Pippali combined powder — added equal weight to final product	500g (equal to medicine weight)
preparation:
1. Prepare kajjali from Shu. Parada (235g) and Shu. Gandhaka (235g). Add Tamra Bhasma (46g) andperform Mardana procedure .perform Mardana procedure  with Jambiri lemon juice.
2. Give 1 Bhavana with Tambula Patra (betel leaf) juice. Form 1 large ball. Dry well.
3. Seal in Sharava Samput (flat-lid clay vessel) with Sandhibandha. Fire in Bhudhar Puta (underground earth pit firing) for 5 Prahara (approx. 15 hours).
4. Next day, when fully cool, open and remove the Aushadhi Golaka. Powder in mortar. Add equal weight of Trikatu Churna (500g). Mix well. Store in glass vessel. This is Tryambakeshvara Rasa.

name: Vata Vidhvamsana Rasa
benefits: Vata Vidhvamsana Rasa treats significantly s: all 80 types of Vata Roga; 8 types of Gulma; 8 types of Shoola; all gastric pain; Malanigraha (constipation); Adhmana; Anaha; Visuchika; Mandagni; Ama Dosha; Daaha; Chardi; Grahani; Shvasa; Kasa; Krimi Roga; Sarvangashotha; Manyastambha; joint diseases; Jvara; Atisara; Tridoshaja Moola Roga. An excellent appetite stimulant â€” persons who suffer from Mandagni should always take it.
ingredients:

Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity

preparation:
1.perform Mardana procedure  all 6 main ingredients together as kajjali with Eranda Taila (castor oil) for 7 full days. Form a large ball.
2. Separatelyperform Mardana procedure  Shu. Haratala (100g) with Nimbu (lemon) juice. Apply a half-finger-thick coat of this Haratala paste around the ball. Dry carefully.
3. Fire in Valuka Yantra (sand bath apparatus) for 12 Yama (36 hours). When cool, remove and powder finely through a fine cloth. Then give 7 Bhavanas each (total 21) with: Panchakola Phanta, Chitraka Moola Kaatha and Varunadi Gana Kaatha.
4. Add Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (13g = 1/16th of total). Mix well. Form pills of 375 mg. Shade-dry. Store in glass vessel. This is Vata Vidhvamsana Rasa.

anupana: Colour (Varna)	Shyava (Dark greyish-brown)\nTaste (Svada)	Katu (Pungent)\nSmell (Gandha)	Rasayana Gandhi

name: Vijaya Bhairav Taila - 1
benefits: Kampavata (Tremors / Parkinson's disease); all Vata Roga
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur — 1st of Surabhitraya	Equal part
Shu. Haratala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide) — 2nd of Surabhitraya	Equal part
Shu. Mana:shila (शु. मन:शिला)	Purified Realgar (Arsenic disulphide) — 3rd of Surabhitraya	Equal part
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
dose: Internal dose: 10 drops in warm milk; External use: Body application (Abhyanga)
preparation:
1. Prepare kajjali from Shu. Parada + Shu. Gandhaka. Add Shu. Haratala and Shu. Mana:shila.perform Mardana procedure  for 1 more day.perform Mardana procedure  again with Kanji (sour fermented liquid). Make a thick Kalka (paste).
2. Take new cloth — 1/4 metre for small batch or 1 metre for large batch. Cut 1 metre cloth into 4 pieces. Apply a thin layer of the Kalka paste on each cloth piece. Roll each piece into a long Batti (wick shape). Tie with thread at intervals.
3. After slight drying, immerse the Batti fully in sesame oil overnight.
4. Next day at 10 AM: hold one end of the Batti with tongs. Light the other end. Collect the oil drops dripping from the burning wick in a vessel below.
5. When entire wick has burned, filter collected oil through a clean cloth. Cool and store in glass vessel. This is Vijaya Bhairav Taila.

Vidanga Churna (विडङ्गचूर्ण)	Embelia ribes powder	Equal part
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	Equal part
Amlavetasa Churna (अम्लवेतसचूर्ण)	Garcinia pedunculata / Himalayan sour sorrel powder	Equal part
preparation: 1. Prepare kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka. Add the three Bhasmas (Teekhna Loha, Abhraka, Svarna Maakshika) and mix. Add all 12 herb powders (Shatkolastaka group, both Jeera types, two Lavanas, Vidanga, Haritaki, Amlavetasa). Mix everything.\n2. Give Bhavana with Bijoura Nimbu (large citron) juice. Form pills of 4 Ratti (500 mg) each. Shade-dry thoroughly. Store in glass vessel. This is Vrikodar Vati — named after Vrikodar (Bhimasena), created by the Trailokya-famous Yogini physician.
